Spring Boot & Java X Posts

Every tweet: diagrams.net architecture diagram + CodePen code pen.

Tweet #1

Architecture — diagrams.net

Code — CodePen pen

html, body {
  margin: 0;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  min-height: 100vh;
  box-sizing: border-box;
}
body {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: stretch;
  justify-content: stretch;
  padding: 0.5rem;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
}
.carbon {
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  width: 100%;
  min-height: calc(100vh - 1rem);
  max-width: none;
  border-radius: 10px;
  box-shadow: 0 12px 48px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
  overflow: hidden;
}
.carbon-titlebar {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
  height: 36px;
  padding: 0 16px;
  background: #252836;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.carbon-dot {
  width: 12px;
  height: 12px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.carbon-dot.red { background: #ff5f56; }
.carbon-dot.yellow { background: #ffbd2e; }
.carbon-dot.green { background: #27c93f; }
.carbon-module {
  margin-left: auto;
  font: 13px/1 system-ui, sans-serif;
  color: #8b949e;
  letter-spacing: 0.02em;
}
.carbon-editor {
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  min-height: 0;
  background: #011627;
  padding: 1.5rem 2rem 1.75rem;
  overflow: auto;
}
.carbon-editor pre {
  margin: 0;
  flex: 1;
  font-family: "Fira Code", "JetBrains Mono", Consolas, monospace;
  font-size: 18px;
  line-height: 30px;
  white-space: pre;
  tab-size: 4;
}
.carbon-editor .kw { color: #c792ea; }
.carbon-editor .ann { color: #ffb86c; }
.carbon-editor .str { color: #c3e88d; }
.carbon-editor .typ { color: #ffcb6b; }
.carbon-editor .met { color: #82aaff; }
.carbon-editor .com { color: #5c6370; }
.carbon-editor .num { color: #f78c6c; }
.carbon-editor .pun { color: #89ddff; }
.carbon-editor .txt { color: #d6deeb; }
.carbon-editor.cols {
  flex-direction: row;
  gap: 1.75rem;
  align-items: stretch;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col {
  flex: 1 1 0;
  min-width: 0;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col pre {
  flex: 1;
  font-size: 15px;
  line-height: 24px;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col-divider {
  align-self: stretch;
  position: relative;
  width: 1px;
  background: #1d3b53;
  flex: 0 0 auto;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col-divider::after {
  content: "\2192";
  position: absolute;
  top: 50%;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
  width: 30px;
  height: 30px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: #011627;
  border: 1px solid #1d3b53;
  color: #82aaff;
  font-size: 16px;
}

<div class="carbon"><div class="carbon-titlebar"><span class="carbon-dot red"></span><span class="carbon-dot yellow"></span><span class="carbon-dot green"></span><span class="carbon-module">spring-boot-minimal-rest-h2</span></div><div class="carbon-editor"><pre><code><span class="ann">@RestController</span>
<span class="ann">@RequestMapping</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">&quot;/library&quot;</span><span class="pun">)</span>
<span class="kw">public</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">class</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">BookController</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>

<span class="txt">    </span><span class="ann">@GetMapping</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">&quot;/book&quot;</span><span class="pun">)</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="kw">public</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">List</span><span class="pun">&lt;</span><span class="typ">Book</span><span class="pun">&gt;</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">findAll</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>
<span class="txt">        </span><span class="kw">return</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">bookService</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">findAll</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="pun">}</span>

<span class="txt">    </span><span class="ann">@PostMapping</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">&quot;/book&quot;</span><span class="pun">)</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="kw">public</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">Book</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">add</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="ann">@RequestBody</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">Book</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">book</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>
<span class="txt">        </span><span class="kw">return</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">bookService</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">save</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="txt">book</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="pun">}</span>
<span class="pun">}</span></code></pre></div></div>

Open pen preview · New pen on CodePen

🚀Spring Boot: Your first REST API in 30 seconds with H2. ✅ Your first REST API in 30 seconds with H2 ✅ Uses `@RestController` in the snippet ✅ Uses `@GetMapping` in the snippet

.drawio diagram · CodePen preview · Source .java

html, body {
  margin: 0;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  min-height: 100vh;
  box-sizing: border-box;
}
body {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: stretch;
  justify-content: stretch;
  padding: 0.5rem;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
}
.carbon {
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  width: 100%;
  min-height: calc(100vh - 1rem);
  max-width: none;
  border-radius: 10px;
  box-shadow: 0 12px 48px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
  overflow: hidden;
}
.carbon-titlebar {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
  height: 36px;
  padding: 0 16px;
  background: #252836;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.carbon-dot {
  width: 12px;
  height: 12px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.carbon-dot.red { background: #ff5f56; }
.carbon-dot.yellow { background: #ffbd2e; }
.carbon-dot.green { background: #27c93f; }
.carbon-module {
  margin-left: auto;
  font: 13px/1 system-ui, sans-serif;
  color: #8b949e;
  letter-spacing: 0.02em;
}
.carbon-editor {
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;

  min-height: 0;
  background: #011627;
  padding: 1.5rem 2rem 1.75rem;
  overflow: auto;
}
.carbon-editor pre {
  margin: 0;
  flex: 1;
  font-family: "Fira Code", "JetBrains Mono", Consolas, monospace;
  font-size: 18px;
  line-height: 30px;
  white-space: pre;
  tab-size: 4;
}
.carbon-editor .kw { color: #c792ea; }
.carbon-editor .ann { color: #ffb86c; }
.carbon-editor .str { color: #c3e88d; }
.carbon-editor .typ { color: #ffcb6b; }
.carbon-editor .met { color: #82aaff; }
.carbon-editor .com { color: #5c6370; }
.carbon-editor .num { color: #f78c6c; }
.carbon-editor .pun { color: #89ddff; }
.carbon-editor .txt { color: #d6deeb; }
.carbon-editor.cols {
  flex-direction: row;
  gap: 1.75rem;
  align-items: stretch;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col {
  flex: 1 1 0;
  min-width: 0;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col pre {
  flex: 1;
  font-size: 15px;
  line-height: 24px;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col-divider {
  align-self: stretch;
  position: relative;
  width: 1px;
  background: #1d3b53;
  flex: 0 0 auto;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col-divider::after {
  content: "\2192";
  position: absolute;
  top: 50%;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
  width: 30px;
  height: 30px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: #011627;
  border: 1px solid #1d3b53;
  color: #82aaff;
  font-size: 16px;
}

<div class="carbon"><div class="carbon-titlebar"><span class="carbon-dot red"></span><span class="carbon-dot yellow"></span><span class="carbon-dot green"></span><span class="carbon-module">spring-boot-paged-rest-example</span></div><div class="carbon-editor"><pre><code><span class="ann">@RestController</span>
<span class="kw">public</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">class</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">UserController</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>

<span class="txt">    </span><span class="kw">private</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">final</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">UserRepository</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">repository</span><span class="pun">;</span>

<span class="txt">    </span><span class="kw">public</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">UserController</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="typ">UserRepository</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">repository</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>
<span class="txt">        </span><span class="kw">this</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="txt">repository</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">repository</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="pun">}</span>
<span class="pun">}</span></code></pre></div></div>

Open pen preview · New pen on CodePen

🚀Spring Boot: Constructor injection beats field injection. ✅ Constructor injection beats field injection ✅ Uses `@RestController` in the snippet ✅ Runnable sample: `spring-boot-paged-rest-example`

.drawio diagram · CodePen preview · Source .java

Architecture — diagrams.net

Code — CodePen pen

html, body {
  margin: 0;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  min-height: 100vh;
  box-sizing: border-box;
}
body {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: stretch;
  justify-content: stretch;
  padding: 0.5rem;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
}
.carbon {
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  width: 100%;
  min-height: calc(100vh - 1rem);
  max-width: none;
  border-radius: 10px;
  box-shadow: 0 12px 48px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
  overflow: hidden;
}
.carbon-titlebar {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
  height: 36px;
  padding: 0 16px;
  background: #252836;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.carbon-dot {
  width: 12px;
  height: 12px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.carbon-dot.red { background: #ff5f56; }
.carbon-dot.yellow { background: #ffbd2e; }
.carbon-dot.green { background: #27c93f; }
.carbon-module {
  margin-left: auto;
  font: 13px/1 system-ui, sans-serif;
  color: #8b949e;
  letter-spacing: 0.02em;
}
.carbon-editor {
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  min-height: 0;
  background: #011627;
  padding: 1.5rem 2rem 1.75rem;
  overflow: auto;
}
.carbon-editor pre {
  margin: 0;
  flex: 1;
  font-family: "Fira Code", "JetBrains Mono", Consolas, monospace;
  font-size: 18px;
  line-height: 30px;
  white-space: pre;
  tab-size: 4;
}
.carbon-editor .kw { color: #c792ea; }
.carbon-editor .ann { color: #ffb86c; }
.carbon-editor .str { color: #c3e88d; }
.carbon-editor .typ { color: #ffcb6b; }
.carbon-editor .met { color: #82aaff; }
.carbon-editor .com { color: #5c6370; }
.carbon-editor .num { color: #f78c6c; }
.carbon-editor .pun { color: #89ddff; }
.carbon-editor .txt { color: #d6deeb; }
.carbon-editor.cols {
  flex-direction: row;
  gap: 1.75rem;
  align-items: stretch;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col {
  flex: 1 1 0;
  min-width: 0;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col pre {
  flex: 1;
  font-size: 15px;
  line-height: 24px;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col-divider {
  align-self: stretch;
  position: relative;
  width: 1px;
  background: #1d3b53;
  flex: 0 0 auto;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col-divider::after {
  content: "\2192";
  position: absolute;
  top: 50%;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
  width: 30px;
  height: 30px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: #011627;
  border: 1px solid #1d3b53;
  color: #82aaff;
  font-size: 16px;
}

<div class="carbon"><div class="carbon-titlebar"><span class="carbon-dot red"></span><span class="carbon-dot yellow"></span><span class="carbon-dot green"></span><span class="carbon-module">spring-boot-paged-rest-example</span></div><div class="carbon-editor"><pre><code><span class="ann">@GetMapping</span>
<span class="kw">public</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">PagedResponse</span><span class="pun">&lt;</span><span class="typ">User</span><span class="pun">&gt;</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">getUsers</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="typ">Pageable</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">pageable</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="typ">Page</span><span class="pun">&lt;</span><span class="typ">User</span><span class="pun">&gt;</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">page</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">repository</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">findAll</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="txt">pageable</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="kw">return</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">new</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">PagedResponse</span><span class="pun">&lt;</span><span class="pun">&gt;</span><span class="pun">(</span>
<span class="txt">        </span><span class="txt">page</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">getContent</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">,</span>
<span class="txt">        </span><span class="txt">page</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">getNumber</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">,</span>
<span class="txt">        </span><span class="txt">page</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">getSize</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">,</span>
<span class="txt">        </span><span class="txt">page</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">getTotalElements</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">,</span>
<span class="txt">        </span><span class="txt">page</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">getTotalPages</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="pun">}</span></code></pre></div></div>

Open pen preview · New pen on CodePen

🚀Spring Boot: Pagination without boilerplate — use Pageable. ✅ Pagination without boilerplate — use Pageable ✅ Uses `@GetMapping` in the snippet ✅ Runnable sample: `spring-boot-paged-rest-example`

.drawio diagram · CodePen preview · Source .java

html, body {
  margin: 0;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  min-height: 100vh;
  box-sizing: border-box;
}
body {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: stretch;
  justify-content: stretch;
  padding: 0.5rem;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
}
.carbon {
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  width: 100%;
  min-height: calc(100vh - 1rem);
  max-width: none;
  border-radius: 10px;
  box-shadow: 0 12px 48px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
  overflow: hidden;
}
.carbon-titlebar {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
  height: 36px;
  padding: 0 16px;
  background: #252836;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.carbon-dot {
  width: 12px;
  height: 12px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.carbon-dot.red { background: #ff5f56; }
.carbon-dot.yellow { background: #ffbd2e; }
.carbon-dot.green { background: #27c93f; }
.carbon-module {
  margin-left: auto;
  font: 13px/1 system-ui, sans-serif;
  color: #8b949e;
  letter-spacing: 0.02em;
}
.carbon-editor {
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  min-height: 0;
  background: #011627;
  padding: 1.5rem 2rem 1.75rem;
  overflow: auto;
}
.carbon-editor pre {
  margin: 0;
  flex: 1;
  font-family: "Fira Code", "JetBrains Mono", Consolas, monospace;
  font-size: 18px;
  line-height: 30px;
  white-space: pre;
  tab-size: 4;
}
.carbon-editor .kw { color: #c792ea; }
.carbon-editor .ann { color: #ffb86c; }
.carbon-editor .str { color: #c3e88d; }
.carbon-editor .typ { color: #ffcb6b; }
.carbon-editor .met { color: #82aaff; }
.carbon-editor .com { color: #5c6370; }
.carbon-editor .num { color: #f78c6c; }
.carbon-editor .pun { color: #89ddff; }
.carbon-editor .txt { color: #d6deeb; }
.carbon-editor.cols {
  flex-direction: row;
  gap: 1.75rem;
  align-items: stretch;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col {
  flex: 1 1 0;
  min-width: 0;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col pre {
  flex: 1;
  font-size: 15px;
  line-height: 24px;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col-divider {
  align-self: stretch;
  position: relative;
  width: 1px;
  background: #1d3b53;

.carbon-editor.cols .col-divider::after {
  content: "\2192";
  position: absolute;
  top: 50%;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
  width: 30px;
  height: 30px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;

  border-radius: 50%;
  background: #011627;
  border: 1px solid #1d3b53;
  color: #82aaff;
  font-size: 16px;
}

<div class="carbon"><div class="carbon-titlebar"><span class="carbon-dot red"></span><span class="carbon-dot yellow"></span><span class="carbon-dot green"></span><span class="carbon-module">spring-boot-minimal-rest-h2</span></div><div class="carbon-editor"><pre><code><span class="ann">@GetMapping</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">&quot;/book/{id}&quot;</span><span class="pun">)</span>
<span class="kw">public</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">Book</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">findById</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="ann">@PathVariable</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">&quot;id&quot;</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">String</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">id</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="kw">return</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">bookService</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">findById</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="txt">id</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="pun">}</span>

<span class="ann">@GetMapping</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">&quot;/book/search&quot;</span><span class="pun">)</span>
<span class="kw">public</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">List</span><span class="pun">&lt;</span><span class="typ">Book</span><span class="pun">&gt;</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">search</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="ann">@RequestParam</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">String</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">title</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="kw">return</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">bookService</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">findByTitle</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="txt">title</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="pun">}</span></code></pre></div></div>

Open pen preview · New pen on CodePen

🚀Spring Boot: @PathVariable vs @RequestParam — know the difference. ✅ @PathVariable vs @RequestParam — know the difference ✅ Uses `@GetMapping` in the snippet ✅ Runnable sample: `spring-boot-minimal-rest-h2`

.drawio diagram · CodePen preview · Source .java

Architecture — diagrams.net

Code — CodePen pen

html, body {
  margin: 0;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  min-height: 100vh;
  box-sizing: border-box;
}
body {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: stretch;
  justify-content: stretch;
  padding: 0.5rem;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
}
.carbon {
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  width: 100%;
  min-height: calc(100vh - 1rem);
  max-width: none;
  border-radius: 10px;
  box-shadow: 0 12px 48px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
  overflow: hidden;
}
.carbon-titlebar {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
  height: 36px;
  padding: 0 16px;
  background: #252836;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.carbon-dot {
  width: 12px;
  height: 12px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.carbon-dot.red { background: #ff5f56; }
.carbon-dot.yellow { background: #ffbd2e; }
.carbon-dot.green { background: #27c93f; }
.carbon-module {
  margin-left: auto;
  font: 13px/1 system-ui, sans-serif;
  color: #8b949e;
  letter-spacing: 0.02em;
}
.carbon-editor {
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  min-height: 0;
  background: #011627;
  padding: 1.5rem 2rem 1.75rem;
  overflow: auto;
}
.carbon-editor pre {
  margin: 0;
  flex: 1;
  font-family: "Fira Code", "JetBrains Mono", Consolas, monospace;
  font-size: 18px;
  line-height: 30px;
  white-space: pre;
  tab-size: 4;
}
.carbon-editor .kw { color: #c792ea; }
.carbon-editor .ann { color: #ffb86c; }
.carbon-editor .str { color: #c3e88d; }
.carbon-editor .typ { color: #ffcb6b; }
.carbon-editor .met { color: #82aaff; }
.carbon-editor .com { color: #5c6370; }
.carbon-editor .num { color: #f78c6c; }
.carbon-editor .pun { color: #89ddff; }
.carbon-editor .txt { color: #d6deeb; }
.carbon-editor.cols {
  flex-direction: row;
  gap: 1.75rem;
  align-items: stretch;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col {
  flex: 1 1 0;
  min-width: 0;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col pre {
  flex: 1;
  font-size: 15px;
  line-height: 24px;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col-divider {
  align-self: stretch;
  position: relative;
  width: 1px;
  background: #1d3b53;
  flex: 0 0 auto;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col-divider::after {
  content: "\2192";
  position: absolute;
  top: 50%;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
  width: 30px;
  height: 30px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: #011627;
  border: 1px solid #1d3b53;
  color: #82aaff;
  font-size: 16px;
}

<div class="carbon"><div class="carbon-titlebar"><span class="carbon-dot red"></span><span class="carbon-dot yellow"></span><span class="carbon-dot green"></span><span class="carbon-module">springboot-error-handling-demo</span></div><div class="carbon-editor"><pre><code><span class="ann">@RestControllerAdvice</span>
<span class="kw">public</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">class</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">GlobalExceptionHandler</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>

<span class="txt">    </span><span class="ann">@ExceptionHandler</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="typ">ResourceNotFoundException</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="kw">class</span><span class="pun">)</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="kw">public</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">ResponseEntity</span><span class="pun">&lt;</span><span class="typ">ErrorResponse</span><span class="pun">&gt;</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">handleNotFound</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="typ">ResourceNotFoundException</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">ex</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>
<span class="txt">        </span><span class="kw">return</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">ResponseEntity</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">status</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="typ">HttpStatus</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="typ">NOT_FOUND</span><span class="pun">)</span>
<span class="txt">            </span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">body</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="kw">new</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">ErrorResponse</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">&quot;NOT_FOUND&quot;</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">ex</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">getMessage</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="pun">}</span>
<span class="pun">}</span>

<span class="ann">@GetMapping</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">&quot;/users/{id}&quot;</span><span class="pun">)</span>
<span class="kw">public</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">User</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">getUser</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="ann">@PathVariable</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">Long</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">id</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="kw">return</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">userService</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">findById</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="txt">id</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="pun">}</span></code></pre></div></div>

Open pen preview · New pen on CodePen

🚀Spring Boot: With @RestControllerAdvice you can handle specific types of exceptions globally instead of using try/catch everywhere. ✅ With @RestControllerAdvice you can handle specific types of exceptions globally instead of using try/catch everywhere ✅ Uses `@ExceptionHandler` in the snippet ✅ Uses `@GetMapping` in the snippet

.drawio diagram · CodePen preview · Source .java

Code — CodePen pen

html, body {
  margin: 0;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  min-height: 100vh;
  box-sizing: border-box;
}
body {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: stretch;
  justify-content: stretch;
  padding: 0.5rem;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
}
.carbon {
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  width: 100%;
  min-height: calc(100vh - 1rem);
  max-width: none;
  border-radius: 10px;
  box-shadow: 0 12px 48px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
  overflow: hidden;
}
.carbon-titlebar {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
  height: 36px;
  padding: 0 16px;
  background: #252836;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.carbon-dot {
  width: 12px;
  height: 12px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.carbon-dot.red { background: #ff5f56; }
.carbon-dot.yellow { background: #ffbd2e; }
.carbon-dot.green { background: #27c93f; }
.carbon-module {
  margin-left: auto;
  font: 13px/1 system-ui, sans-serif;
  color: #8b949e;
  letter-spacing: 0.02em;
}
.carbon-editor {
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  min-height: 0;
  background: #011627;
  padding: 1.5rem 2rem 1.75rem;
  overflow: auto;
}
.carbon-editor pre {
  margin: 0;
  flex: 1;
  font-family: "Fira Code", "JetBrains Mono", Consolas, monospace;
  font-size: 18px;
  line-height: 30px;
  white-space: pre;
  tab-size: 4;
}
.carbon-editor .kw { color: #c792ea; }
.carbon-editor .ann { color: #ffb86c; }
.carbon-editor .str { color: #c3e88d; }
.carbon-editor .typ { color: #ffcb6b; }
.carbon-editor .met { color: #82aaff; }
.carbon-editor .com { color: #5c6370; }
.carbon-editor .num { color: #f78c6c; }
.carbon-editor .pun { color: #89ddff; }
.carbon-editor .txt { color: #d6deeb; }
.carbon-editor.cols {
  flex-direction: row;
  gap: 1.75rem;
  align-items: stretch;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col {
  flex: 1 1 0;
  min-width: 0;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col pre {
  flex: 1;
  font-size: 15px;
  line-height: 24px;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col-divider {
  align-self: stretch;
  position: relative;
  width: 1px;
  background: #1d3b53;
  flex: 0 0 auto;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col-divider::after {
  content: "\2192";
  position: absolute;
  top: 50%;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
  width: 30px;
  height: 30px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: #011627;
  border: 1px solid #1d3b53;
  color: #82aaff;
  font-size: 16px;
}

<div class="carbon"><div class="carbon-titlebar"><span class="carbon-dot red"></span><span class="carbon-dot yellow"></span><span class="carbon-dot green"></span><span class="carbon-module">springboot-error-handling-demo</span></div><div class="carbon-editor"><pre><code><span class="kw">public</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">class</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">ErrorResponse</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="kw">private</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">Instant</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">timestamp</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="kw">private</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">int</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">status</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="kw">private</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">String</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">error</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="kw">private</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">String</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">message</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="kw">private</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">String</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">path</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="pun">}</span></code></pre></div></div>

Open pen preview · New pen on CodePen

🚀Spring Boot: Stop returning stack traces to clients — return a stable JSON structure. ✅ Stop returning stack traces to clients — return a stable JSON structure ✅ Runnable sample: `springboot-error-handling-demo` ✅ Architecture diagram + Carbon CodePen below

.drawio diagram · CodePen preview · Source .java

  margin: 0;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  min-height: 100vh;
  box-sizing: border-box;
}
body {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: stretch;
  justify-content: stretch;
  padding: 0.5rem;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
}
.carbon {
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  width: 100%;
  min-height: calc(100vh - 1rem);
  max-width: none;
  border-radius: 10px;
  box-shadow: 0 12px 48px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
  overflow: hidden;
}
.carbon-titlebar {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
  height: 36px;
  padding: 0 16px;
  background: #252836;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

  width: 12px;

  flex-shrink: 0;

  margin: 0;
  flex: 1;
  font-family: "Fira Code", "JetBrains Mono", Consolas, monospace;

.carbon-editor .str { color: #c3e88d; }
.carbon-editor .typ { color: #ffcb6b; }
.carbon-editor .met { color: #82aaff; }
.carbon-editor .com { color: #5c6370; }
.carbon-editor .num { color: #f78c6c; }

<div class="carbon"><div class="carbon-titlebar"><span class="carbon-dot red"></span><span class="carbon-dot yellow"></span><span class="carbon-dot green"></span><span class="carbon-module">springboot-error-handling-demo</span></div><div class="carbon-editor"><pre><code><span class="ann">@RestControllerAdvice</span>
<span class="kw">public</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">class</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">GlobalExceptionHandler</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>

<span class="txt">    </span><span class="ann">@ExceptionHandler</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="typ">ResourceNotFoundException</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="kw">class</span><span class="pun">)</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="kw">public</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">ResponseEntity</span><span class="pun">&lt;</span><span class="typ">ErrorResponse</span><span class="pun">&gt;</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">handleNotFound</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="typ">ResourceNotFoundException</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">ex</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>
<span class="txt">        </span><span class="kw">return</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">ResponseEntity</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">status</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="typ">HttpStatus</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="typ">NOT_FOUND</span><span class="pun">)</span>
<span class="txt">            </span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">body</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="kw">new</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">ErrorResponse</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">&quot;NOT_FOUND&quot;</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">ex</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">getMessage</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="pun">}</span>

<span class="txt">    </span><span class="ann">@ExceptionHandler</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="typ">IllegalArgumentException</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="kw">class</span><span class="pun">)</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="kw">public</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">ResponseEntity</span><span class="pun">&lt;</span><span class="typ">ErrorResponse</span><span class="pun">&gt;</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">handleBadRequest</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="typ">IllegalArgumentException</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">ex</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>
<span class="txt">        </span><span class="kw">return</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">ResponseEntity</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">status</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="typ">HttpStatus</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="typ">BAD_REQUEST</span><span class="pun">)</span>
<span class="txt">            </span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">body</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="kw">new</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">ErrorResponse</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">&quot;BAD_REQUEST&quot;</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">ex</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">getMessage</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="pun">}</span>
<span class="pun">}</span>

<span class="com">// Controllers stay clean — no try/catch everywhere</span>
<span class="ann">@GetMapping</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">&quot;/users/{id}&quot;</span><span class="pun">)</span>
<span class="kw">public</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">User</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">getUser</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="ann">@PathVariable</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">Long</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">id</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="kw">return</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">userService</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">findById</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="txt">id</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="pun">}</span></code></pre></div></div>

Open pen preview · New pen on CodePen

🚀Spring Boot: Always map exceptions to HTTP status + a safe JSON body. ✅ Always map exceptions to HTTP status + a safe JSON body ✅ Runnable sample: `springboot-error-handling-demo` ✅ Architecture diagram + Carbon CodePen below

.drawio diagram · CodePen preview · Source .java

body {

  align-items: stretch;

  flex: 1;
  display: flex;

  min-height: calc(100vh - 1rem);

<div class="carbon"><div class="carbon-titlebar"><span class="carbon-dot red"></span><span class="carbon-dot yellow"></span><span class="carbon-dot green"></span><span class="carbon-module">springboot-error-handling-demo</span></div><div class="carbon-editor"><pre><code><span class="com">// ✅ timestamp</span>
<span class="com">// ✅ status</span>
<span class="com">// ✅ error (short code)</span>
<span class="com">// ✅ message (user-safe)</span>
<span class="com">// ✅ path</span>
<span class="com">// Never leak SQL or internal hostnames</span></code></pre></div></div>

html, body {
  margin: 0;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  min-height: 100vh;
  box-sizing: border-box;
}
body {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: stretch;
  justify-content: stretch;
  padding: 0.5rem;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
}
.carbon {
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  width: 100%;
  min-height: calc(100vh - 1rem);
  max-width: none;
  border-radius: 10px;
  box-shadow: 0 12px 48px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
  overflow: hidden;
}
.carbon-titlebar {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
  height: 36px;
  padding: 0 16px;
  background: #252836;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.carbon-dot {
  width: 12px;
  height: 12px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.carbon-dot.red { background: #ff5f56; }
.carbon-dot.yellow { background: #ffbd2e; }
.carbon-dot.green { background: #27c93f; }
.carbon-module {
  margin-left: auto;
  font: 13px/1 system-ui, sans-serif;
  color: #8b949e;
  letter-spacing: 0.02em;
}
.carbon-editor {
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  min-height: 0;
  background: #011627;
  padding: 1.5rem 2rem 1.75rem;
  overflow: auto;
}
.carbon-editor pre {
  margin: 0;
  flex: 1;
  font-family: "Fira Code", "JetBrains Mono", Consolas, monospace;
  font-size: 18px;
  line-height: 30px;
  white-space: pre;
  tab-size: 4;
}
.carbon-editor .kw { color: #c792ea; }
.carbon-editor .ann { color: #ffb86c; }
.carbon-editor .str { color: #c3e88d; }
.carbon-editor .typ { color: #ffcb6b; }
.carbon-editor .met { color: #82aaff; }
.carbon-editor .com { color: #5c6370; }
.carbon-editor .num { color: #f78c6c; }
.carbon-editor .pun { color: #89ddff; }
.carbon-editor .txt { color: #d6deeb; }
.carbon-editor.cols {
  flex-direction: row;
  gap: 1.75rem;
  align-items: stretch;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col {
  flex: 1 1 0;
  min-width: 0;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col pre {
  flex: 1;
  font-size: 15px;
  line-height: 24px;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col-divider {
  align-self: stretch;
  position: relative;
  width: 1px;
  background: #1d3b53;
  flex: 0 0 auto;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col-divider::after {
  content: "\2192";
  position: absolute;
  top: 50%;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
  width: 30px;
  height: 30px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: #011627;
  border: 1px solid #1d3b53;
  color: #82aaff;
  font-size: 16px;
}

<div class="carbon"><div class="carbon-titlebar"><span class="carbon-dot red"></span><span class="carbon-dot yellow"></span><span class="carbon-dot green"></span><span class="carbon-module">spring-boot-validated-config</span></div><div class="carbon-editor"><pre><code><span class="ann">@Validated</span>
<span class="ann">@ConfigurationProperties</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="txt">prefix</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="str">&quot;app&quot;</span><span class="pun">)</span>
<span class="kw">public</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">class</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">AppProperties</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>

<span class="txt">    </span><span class="ann">@NotBlank</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="kw">private</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">String</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">name</span><span class="pun">;</span>

<span class="txt">    </span><span class="ann">@Min</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="num">1</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="ann">@Max</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="num">60</span><span class="pun">)</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="kw">private</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">Integer</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">timeout</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="pun">}</span></code></pre></div></div>

Open pen preview · New pen on CodePen

🚀Spring Boot: Fail fast at startup with @Validated + @ConfigurationProperties. ✅ Fail fast at startup with @Validated + @ConfigurationProperties ✅ Runnable sample: `spring-boot-validated-config` ✅ Architecture diagram + Carbon CodePen below

.drawio diagram · CodePen preview · Source .java

Architecture — diagrams.net

Code — CodePen pen

html, body {
  margin: 0;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  min-height: 100vh;
  box-sizing: border-box;
}
body {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: stretch;
  justify-content: stretch;
  padding: 0.5rem;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
}
.carbon {
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  width: 100%;
  min-height: calc(100vh - 1rem);
  max-width: none;
  border-radius: 10px;
  box-shadow: 0 12px 48px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
  overflow: hidden;
}
.carbon-titlebar {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
  height: 36px;
  padding: 0 16px;
  background: #252836;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.carbon-dot {
  width: 12px;
  height: 12px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.carbon-dot.red { background: #ff5f56; }
.carbon-dot.yellow { background: #ffbd2e; }
.carbon-dot.green { background: #27c93f; }
.carbon-module {
  margin-left: auto;
  font: 13px/1 system-ui, sans-serif;
  color: #8b949e;
  letter-spacing: 0.02em;
}
.carbon-editor {
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  min-height: 0;
  background: #011627;
  padding: 1.5rem 2rem 1.75rem;
  overflow: auto;
}
.carbon-editor pre {
  margin: 0;
  flex: 1;
  font-family: "Fira Code", "JetBrains Mono", Consolas, monospace;
  font-size: 18px;
  line-height: 30px;
  white-space: pre;
  tab-size: 4;
}
.carbon-editor .kw { color: #c792ea; }
.carbon-editor .ann { color: #ffb86c; }
.carbon-editor .str { color: #c3e88d; }
.carbon-editor .typ { color: #ffcb6b; }
.carbon-editor .met { color: #82aaff; }
.carbon-editor .com { color: #5c6370; }
.carbon-editor .num { color: #f78c6c; }
.carbon-editor .pun { color: #89ddff; }
.carbon-editor .txt { color: #d6deeb; }
.carbon-editor.cols {
  flex-direction: row;
  gap: 1.75rem;
  align-items: stretch;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col {
  flex: 1 1 0;
  min-width: 0;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col pre {
  flex: 1;
  font-size: 15px;
  line-height: 24px;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col-divider {
  align-self: stretch;
  position: relative;
  width: 1px;
  background: #1d3b53;
  flex: 0 0 auto;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col-divider::after {
  content: "\2192";
  position: absolute;
  top: 50%;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
  width: 30px;
  height: 30px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: #011627;
  border: 1px solid #1d3b53;
  color: #82aaff;
  font-size: 16px;
}

<div class="carbon"><div class="carbon-titlebar"><span class="carbon-dot red"></span><span class="carbon-dot yellow"></span><span class="carbon-dot green"></span><span class="carbon-module">spring-boot-validated-config</span></div><div class="carbon-editor"><pre><code><span class="ann">@Valid</span>
<span class="kw">private</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">Security</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">security</span><span class="pun">;</span>

<span class="kw">public</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">static</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">class</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">Security</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="ann">@NotBlank</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">private</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">String</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">username</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="ann">@NotBlank</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">private</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">String</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">password</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="pun">}</span></code></pre></div></div>

}
.carbon-editor.cols .col-divider {
  align-self: stretch;
  position: relative;
  width: 1px;
  background: #1d3b53;
  flex: 0 0 auto;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col-divider::after {
  content: "\2192";
  position: absolute;
  top: 50%;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
  width: 30px;
  height: 30px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: #011627;
  border: 1px solid #1d3b53;
  color: #82aaff;
  font-size: 16px;
}

<div class="carbon"><div class="carbon-titlebar"><span class="carbon-dot red"></span><span class="carbon-dot yellow"></span><span class="carbon-dot green"></span><span class="carbon-module">sql-annotation-demo</span></div><div class="carbon-editor"><pre><code><span class="ann">@SpringBootTest</span>
<span class="ann">@Sql</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">&quot;/test-data.sql&quot;</span><span class="pun">)</span>
<span class="kw">class</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">UserRepositoryTest</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>

<span class="txt">    </span><span class="ann">@Autowired</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">UserRepository</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">repo</span><span class="pun">;</span>

<span class="txt">    </span><span class="ann">@Test</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="kw">void</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">testUserLoadedFromSql</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>
<span class="txt">        </span><span class="kw">var</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">user</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">repo</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">findById</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="num">1</span><span class="typ">L</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">orElseThrow</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="txt">        </span><span class="met">assertEquals</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">&quot;Alice&quot;</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">user</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">getName</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="pun">}</span>
<span class="pun">}</span></code></pre></div></div>

Open pen preview · New pen on CodePen

🚀Spring Boot: @Sql or @SqlGroup allows you to preload test data for reproducible tests. ✅ @Sql or @SqlGroup allows you to preload test data for reproducible tests ✅ Uses `@SpringBootTest` in the snippet ✅ Runnable sample: `sql-annotation-demo`

.drawio diagram · CodePen preview · Source .java

Tweet #15

Architecture — diagrams.net

Code — CodePen pen

html, body {
  margin: 0;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  min-height: 100vh;
  box-sizing: border-box;
}
body {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: stretch;
  justify-content: stretch;
  padding: 0.5rem;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
}
.carbon {
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  width: 100%;
  min-height: calc(100vh - 1rem);
  max-width: none;
  border-radius: 10px;
  box-shadow: 0 12px 48px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
  overflow: hidden;
}
.carbon-titlebar {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
  height: 36px;
  padding: 0 16px;
  background: #252836;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.carbon-dot {
  width: 12px;
  height: 12px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.carbon-dot.red { background: #ff5f56; }
.carbon-dot.yellow { background: #ffbd2e; }
.carbon-dot.green { background: #27c93f; }
.carbon-module {
  margin-left: auto;
  font: 13px/1 system-ui, sans-serif;
  color: #8b949e;
  letter-spacing: 0.02em;
}
.carbon-editor {
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  min-height: 0;
  background: #011627;
  padding: 1.5rem 2rem 1.75rem;
  overflow: auto;
}
.carbon-editor pre {
  margin: 0;
  flex: 1;
  font-family: "Fira Code", "JetBrains Mono", Consolas, monospace;
  font-size: 18px;
  line-height: 30px;
  white-space: pre;
  tab-size: 4;
}
.carbon-editor .kw { color: #c792ea; }
.carbon-editor .ann { color: #ffb86c; }
.carbon-editor .str { color: #c3e88d; }
.carbon-editor .typ { color: #ffcb6b; }
.carbon-editor .met { color: #82aaff; }
.carbon-editor .com { color: #5c6370; }
.carbon-editor .num { color: #f78c6c; }
.carbon-editor .pun { color: #89ddff; }
.carbon-editor .txt { color: #d6deeb; }
.carbon-editor.cols {
  flex-direction: row;
  gap: 1.75rem;
  align-items: stretch;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col {
  flex: 1 1 0;
  min-width: 0;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col pre {
  flex: 1;
  font-size: 15px;
  line-height: 24px;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col-divider {
  align-self: stretch;
  position: relative;
  width: 1px;
  background: #1d3b53;
  flex: 0 0 auto;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col-divider::after {
  content: "\2192";
  position: absolute;
  top: 50%;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
  width: 30px;
  height: 30px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: #011627;
  border: 1px solid #1d3b53;
  color: #82aaff;
  font-size: 16px;
}

<div class="carbon"><div class="carbon-titlebar"><span class="carbon-dot red"></span><span class="carbon-dot yellow"></span><span class="carbon-dot green"></span><span class="carbon-module">spring-streaming-demo</span></div><div class="carbon-editor"><pre><code><span class="ann">@Query</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">&quot;SELECT u FROM User u&quot;</span><span class="pun">)</span>
<span class="typ">Stream</span><span class="pun">&lt;</span><span class="typ">User</span><span class="pun">&gt;</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">streamAllUsers</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span></code></pre></div></div>

Open pen preview · New pen on CodePen

🚀Spring Boot: Processing 1M rows with findAll() will OOM you — use a Stream. ✅ Processing 1M rows with findAll() will OOM you — use a Stream ✅ Runnable sample: `spring-streaming-demo` ✅ Architecture diagram + Carbon CodePen below

.drawio diagram · CodePen preview · Source .java

<div class="carbon"><div class="carbon-titlebar"><span class="carbon-dot red"></span><span class="carbon-dot yellow"></span><span class="carbon-dot green"></span><span class="carbon-module">spring-streaming-demo</span></div><div class="carbon-editor"><pre><code><span class="kw">try</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="typ">Stream</span><span class="pun">&lt;</span><span class="typ">User</span><span class="pun">&gt;</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">stream</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">repository</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">streamAllUsers</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="txt">stream</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">forEach</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="txt">user</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">-</span><span class="pun">&gt;</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>
<span class="txt">        </span><span class="met">process</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="txt">user</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="txt">        </span><span class="kw">if</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="txt">counter</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">incrementAndGet</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">%</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="num">100</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="num">0</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>
<span class="txt">            </span><span class="txt">em</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">clear</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="txt">        </span><span class="pun">}</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="pun">}</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="pun">}</span></code></pre></div></div>

Open pen preview · New pen on CodePen

🚀Spring Boot: Call EntityManager.clear() every N rows when streaming. ✅ Call EntityManager.clear() every N rows when streaming ✅ Runnable sample: `spring-streaming-demo` ✅ Architecture diagram + Carbon CodePen below

  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  min-height: 100vh;
  box-sizing: border-box;
}
body {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: stretch;
  justify-content: stretch;
  padding: 0.5rem;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
}
.carbon {
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  width: 100%;
  min-height: calc(100vh - 1rem);

  border-radius: 10px;

.carbon-editor .str { color: #c3e88d; }
.carbon-editor .typ { color: #ffcb6b; }
.carbon-editor .met { color: #82aaff; }
.carbon-editor .com { color: #5c6370; }
.carbon-editor .num { color: #f78c6c; }
.carbon-editor .pun { color: #89ddff; }

.carbon-editor.cols .col {

<div class="carbon"><div class="carbon-titlebar"><span class="carbon-dot red"></span><span class="carbon-dot yellow"></span><span class="carbon-dot green"></span><span class="carbon-module">spring-streaming-demo</span></div><div class="carbon-editor"><pre><code><span class="kw">try</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="typ">Stream</span><span class="pun">&lt;</span><span class="typ">User</span><span class="pun">&gt;</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">stream</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">repository</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">streamAllUsers</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="txt">stream</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">forEach</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="kw">this</span><span class="pun">:</span><span class="pun">:</span><span class="txt">process</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="pun">}</span></code></pre></div></div>

🚀Spring Boot: Always wrap JPA streams in try-with-resources. ✅ Always wrap JPA streams in try-with-resources ✅ Runnable sample: `spring-streaming-demo` ✅ Architecture diagram + Carbon CodePen below

.carbon-editor .kw { color: #c792ea; }
.carbon-editor .ann { color: #ffb86c; }
.carbon-editor .str { color: #c3e88d; }
.carbon-editor .typ { color: #ffcb6b; }
.carbon-editor .met { color: #82aaff; }
.carbon-editor .com { color: #5c6370; }
.carbon-editor .num { color: #f78c6c; }
.carbon-editor .pun { color: #89ddff; }
.carbon-editor .txt { color: #d6deeb; }
.carbon-editor.cols {
  flex-direction: row;
  gap: 1.75rem;
  align-items: stretch;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col {
  flex: 1 1 0;
  min-width: 0;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col pre {
  flex: 1;
  font-size: 15px;
  line-height: 24px;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col-divider {
  align-self: stretch;
  position: relative;
  width: 1px;
  background: #1d3b53;
  flex: 0 0 auto;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col-divider::after {
  content: "\2192";
  position: absolute;
  top: 50%;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
  width: 30px;
  height: 30px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: #011627;
  border: 1px solid #1d3b53;
  color: #82aaff;
  font-size: 16px;
}

<div class="carbon"><div class="carbon-titlebar"><span class="carbon-dot red"></span><span class="carbon-dot yellow"></span><span class="carbon-dot green"></span><span class="carbon-module">spring-kafka-demo</span></div><div class="carbon-editor"><pre><code><span class="ann">@Service</span>
<span class="kw">public</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">class</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">MessageProducer</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>

<span class="txt">    </span><span class="kw">private</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">final</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">KafkaTemplate</span><span class="pun">&lt;</span><span class="typ">String</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">String</span><span class="pun">&gt;</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">kafkaTemplate</span><span class="pun">;</span>

<span class="txt">    </span><span class="kw">public</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">void</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">send</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="typ">String</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">message</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>
<span class="txt">        </span><span class="txt">kafkaTemplate</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">send</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">&quot;demo-topic&quot;</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">message</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="pun">}</span>
<span class="pun">}</span></code></pre></div></div>

Architecture — diagrams.net

Code — CodePen pen

html, body {
  margin: 0;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  min-height: 100vh;
  box-sizing: border-box;
}
body {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: stretch;
  justify-content: stretch;
  padding: 0.5rem;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
}
.carbon {
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  width: 100%;
  min-height: calc(100vh - 1rem);
  max-width: none;
  border-radius: 10px;
  box-shadow: 0 12px 48px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
  overflow: hidden;
}
.carbon-titlebar {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
  height: 36px;
  padding: 0 16px;
  background: #252836;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.carbon-dot {
  width: 12px;
  height: 12px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.carbon-dot.red { background: #ff5f56; }
.carbon-dot.yellow { background: #ffbd2e; }
.carbon-dot.green { background: #27c93f; }
.carbon-module {
  margin-left: auto;
  font: 13px/1 system-ui, sans-serif;
  color: #8b949e;
  letter-spacing: 0.02em;
}
.carbon-editor {
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  min-height: 0;
  background: #011627;
  padding: 1.5rem 2rem 1.75rem;
  overflow: auto;
}
.carbon-editor pre {
  margin: 0;
  flex: 1;
  font-family: "Fira Code", "JetBrains Mono", Consolas, monospace;
  font-size: 18px;
  line-height: 30px;
  white-space: pre;
  tab-size: 4;
}
.carbon-editor .kw { color: #c792ea; }
.carbon-editor .ann { color: #ffb86c; }
.carbon-editor .str { color: #c3e88d; }
.carbon-editor .typ { color: #ffcb6b; }
.carbon-editor .met { color: #82aaff; }
.carbon-editor .com { color: #5c6370; }
.carbon-editor .num { color: #f78c6c; }
.carbon-editor .pun { color: #89ddff; }
.carbon-editor .txt { color: #d6deeb; }
.carbon-editor.cols {
  flex-direction: row;
  gap: 1.75rem;
  align-items: stretch;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col {
  flex: 1 1 0;
  min-width: 0;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col pre {
  flex: 1;
  font-size: 15px;
  line-height: 24px;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col-divider {
  align-self: stretch;
  position: relative;
  width: 1px;
  background: #1d3b53;
  flex: 0 0 auto;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col-divider::after {
  content: "\2192";
  position: absolute;
  top: 50%;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
  width: 30px;
  height: 30px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: #011627;
  border: 1px solid #1d3b53;
  color: #82aaff;
  font-size: 16px;
}

<div class="carbon"><div class="carbon-titlebar"><span class="carbon-dot red"></span><span class="carbon-dot yellow"></span><span class="carbon-dot green"></span><span class="carbon-module">spring-kafka-demo</span></div><div class="carbon-editor"><pre><code><span class="ann">@KafkaListener</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="txt">topics</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="str">&quot;demo-topic&quot;</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">groupId</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="str">&quot;demo-group&quot;</span><span class="pun">)</span>
<span class="kw">public</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">void</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">listen</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="typ">String</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">message</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="typ">System</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="txt">out</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">println</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">&quot;Received: &quot;</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">+</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">message</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="pun">}</span></code></pre></div></div>

<div class="carbon"><div class="carbon-titlebar"><span class="carbon-dot red"></span><span class="carbon-dot yellow"></span><span class="carbon-dot green"></span><span class="carbon-module">spring-transactional-event-demo</span></div><div class="carbon-editor"><pre><code><span class="ann">@Transactional</span>
<span class="kw">public</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">Order</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">createOrder</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="typ">String</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">product</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="typ">Order</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">order</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">repository</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">save</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="kw">new</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">Order</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="txt">product</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="txt">publisher</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">publishEvent</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="kw">new</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">OrderCreatedEvent</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="txt">order</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">getId</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="kw">return</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">order</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="pun">}</span></code></pre></div></div>

Open pen preview · New pen on CodePen

🚀Spring Boot: Decouple services: save to DB, then publish an application event. ✅ Decouple services: save to DB, then publish an application event ✅ Uses `@Transactional` in the snippet ✅ Runnable sample: `spring-transactional-event-demo`

.drawio diagram · CodePen preview · Source .java

html, body {
  margin: 0;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  min-height: 100vh;
  box-sizing: border-box;
}
body {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: stretch;
  justify-content: stretch;
  padding: 0.5rem;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
}
.carbon {
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  width: 100%;
  min-height: calc(100vh - 1rem);
  max-width: none;
  border-radius: 10px;
  box-shadow: 0 12px 48px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
  overflow: hidden;
}
.carbon-titlebar {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
  height: 36px;
  padding: 0 16px;
  background: #252836;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.carbon-dot {
  width: 12px;
  height: 12px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.carbon-dot.red { background: #ff5f56; }
.carbon-dot.yellow { background: #ffbd2e; }
.carbon-dot.green { background: #27c93f; }
.carbon-module {
  margin-left: auto;
  font: 13px/1 system-ui, sans-serif;
  color: #8b949e;
  letter-spacing: 0.02em;
}
.carbon-editor {
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  min-height: 0;
  background: #011627;
  padding: 1.5rem 2rem 1.75rem;
  overflow: auto;
}
.carbon-editor pre {
  margin: 0;
  flex: 1;
  font-family: "Fira Code", "JetBrains Mono", Consolas, monospace;
  font-size: 18px;
  line-height: 30px;
  white-space: pre;
  tab-size: 4;
}
.carbon-editor .kw { color: #c792ea; }
.carbon-editor .ann { color: #ffb86c; }
.carbon-editor .str { color: #c3e88d; }
.carbon-editor .typ { color: #ffcb6b; }
.carbon-editor .met { color: #82aaff; }
.carbon-editor .com { color: #5c6370; }
.carbon-editor .num { color: #f78c6c; }
.carbon-editor .pun { color: #89ddff; }
.carbon-editor .txt { color: #d6deeb; }
.carbon-editor.cols {
  flex-direction: row;
  gap: 1.75rem;
  align-items: stretch;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col {
  flex: 1 1 0;
  min-width: 0;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col pre {
  flex: 1;
  font-size: 15px;
  line-height: 24px;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col-divider {
  align-self: stretch;
  position: relative;
  width: 1px;
  background: #1d3b53;
  flex: 0 0 auto;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col-divider::after {
  content: "\2192";
  position: absolute;
  top: 50%;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
  width: 30px;
  height: 30px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: #011627;
  border: 1px solid #1d3b53;
  color: #82aaff;
  font-size: 16px;
}

<div class="carbon"><div class="carbon-titlebar"><span class="carbon-dot red"></span><span class="carbon-dot yellow"></span><span class="carbon-dot green"></span><span class="carbon-module">spring-transactional-event-demo</span></div><div class="carbon-editor"><pre><code><span class="ann">@TransactionalEventListener</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="txt">phase</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">TransactionPhase</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="typ">AFTER_COMMIT</span><span class="pun">)</span>
<span class="kw">public</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">void</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">handleOrderCreated</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="typ">OrderCreatedEvent</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">event</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="com">// send confirmation email</span>
<span class="pun">}</span></code></pre></div></div>

Open pen preview · New pen on CodePen

🚀Spring Boot: Don't send the email before commit — use AFTER_COMMIT. ✅ Don't send the email before commit — use AFTER_COMMIT ✅ Runnable sample: `spring-transactional-event-demo` ✅ Architecture diagram + Carbon CodePen below

.drawio diagram · CodePen preview · Source .java

.carbon-module {
  margin-left: auto;
  font: 13px/1 system-ui, sans-serif;
  color: #8b949e;
  letter-spacing: 0.02em;
}
.carbon-editor {
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  min-height: 0;
  background: #011627;
  padding: 1.5rem 2rem 1.75rem;
  overflow: auto;
}
.carbon-editor pre {
  margin: 0;
  flex: 1;
  font-family: "Fira Code", "JetBrains Mono", Consolas, monospace;
  font-size: 18px;
  line-height: 30px;
  white-space: pre;
  tab-size: 4;
}
.carbon-editor .kw { color: #c792ea; }
.carbon-editor .ann { color: #ffb86c; }
.carbon-editor .str { color: #c3e88d; }
.carbon-editor .typ { color: #ffcb6b; }
.carbon-editor .met { color: #82aaff; }
.carbon-editor .com { color: #5c6370; }
.carbon-editor .num { color: #f78c6c; }
.carbon-editor .pun { color: #89ddff; }
.carbon-editor .txt { color: #d6deeb; }
.carbon-editor.cols {
  flex-direction: row;
  gap: 1.75rem;
  align-items: stretch;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col {
  flex: 1 1 0;
  min-width: 0;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col pre {
  flex: 1;
  font-size: 15px;
  line-height: 24px;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col-divider {
  align-self: stretch;
  position: relative;
  width: 1px;
  background: #1d3b53;
  flex: 0 0 auto;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col-divider::after {
  content: "\2192";
  position: absolute;
  top: 50%;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
  width: 30px;
  height: 30px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: #011627;
  border: 1px solid #1d3b53;
  color: #82aaff;
  font-size: 16px;
}

<div class="carbon"><div class="carbon-titlebar"><span class="carbon-dot red"></span><span class="carbon-dot yellow"></span><span class="carbon-dot green"></span><span class="carbon-module">async-demo</span></div><div class="carbon-editor"><pre><code><span class="ann">@EnableAsync</span>
<span class="ann">@SpringBootApplication</span>
<span class="kw">public</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">class</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">DemoApplication</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">}</span>

<span class="ann">@Async</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">&quot;taskExecutor&quot;</span><span class="pun">)</span>
<span class="kw">public</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">void</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">runTask</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">}</span></code></pre></div></div>

Open pen preview · New pen on CodePen

🚀Spring Boot: Use @Async only for small offloading tasks, and with a provided executor. ✅ Use @Async only for small offloading tasks, and with a provided executor ✅ Runnable sample: `async-demo` ✅ Architecture diagram + Carbon CodePen below

.drawio diagram · CodePen preview · Source .java

html, body {
  margin: 0;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  min-height: 100vh;
  box-sizing: border-box;
}
body {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: stretch;
  justify-content: stretch;
  padding: 0.5rem;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
}
.carbon {
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  width: 100%;
  min-height: calc(100vh - 1rem);
  max-width: none;
  border-radius: 10px;
  box-shadow: 0 12px 48px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
  overflow: hidden;
}
.carbon-titlebar {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
  height: 36px;
  padding: 0 16px;
  background: #252836;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.carbon-dot {
  width: 12px;
  height: 12px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.carbon-dot.red { background: #ff5f56; }
.carbon-dot.yellow { background: #ffbd2e; }
.carbon-dot.green { background: #27c93f; }
.carbon-module {
  margin-left: auto;
  font: 13px/1 system-ui, sans-serif;
  color: #8b949e;
  letter-spacing: 0.02em;
}
.carbon-editor {
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  min-height: 0;
  background: #011627;
  padding: 1.5rem 2rem 1.75rem;
  overflow: auto;
}
.carbon-editor pre {
  margin: 0;
  flex: 1;
  font-family: "Fira Code", "JetBrains Mono", Consolas, monospace;
  font-size: 18px;
  line-height: 30px;
  white-space: pre;
  tab-size: 4;
}
.carbon-editor .kw { color: #c792ea; }
.carbon-editor .ann { color: #ffb86c; }
.carbon-editor .str { color: #c3e88d; }
.carbon-editor .typ { color: #ffcb6b; }
.carbon-editor .met { color: #82aaff; }
.carbon-editor .com { color: #5c6370; }
.carbon-editor .num { color: #f78c6c; }
.carbon-editor .pun { color: #89ddff; }
.carbon-editor .txt { color: #d6deeb; }
.carbon-editor.cols {
  flex-direction: row;
  gap: 1.75rem;
  align-items: stretch;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col {
  flex: 1 1 0;
  min-width: 0;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col pre {
  flex: 1;
  font-size: 15px;
  line-height: 24px;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col-divider {
  align-self: stretch;
  position: relative;
  width: 1px;
  background: #1d3b53;
  flex: 0 0 auto;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col-divider::after {
  content: "\2192";
  position: absolute;
  top: 50%;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
  width: 30px;
  height: 30px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: #011627;
  border: 1px solid #1d3b53;
  color: #82aaff;
  font-size: 16px;
}

<div class="carbon"><div class="carbon-titlebar"><span class="carbon-dot red"></span><span class="carbon-dot yellow"></span><span class="carbon-dot green"></span><span class="carbon-module">async-demo</span></div><div class="carbon-editor"><pre><code><span class="txt">executor</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">setCorePoolSize</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="num">2</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="txt">executor</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">setMaxPoolSize</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="num">5</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="txt">executor</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">setQueueCapacity</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="num">10</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="txt">executor</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">setThreadNamePrefix</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">&quot;Async-&quot;</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span></code></pre></div></div>

🚀Spring Boot: Don't use the default executor in production. ✅ Don't use the default executor in production ✅ Runnable sample: `async-demo` ✅ Architecture diagram + Carbon CodePen below

<div class="carbon"><div class="carbon-titlebar"><span class="carbon-dot red"></span><span class="carbon-dot yellow"></span><span class="carbon-dot green"></span><span class="carbon-module">springboot-redis-cache-demo</span></div><div class="carbon-editor"><pre><code><span class="ann">@Cacheable</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="txt">value</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="str">&quot;weather&quot;</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">key</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="str">&quot;#city&quot;</span><span class="pun">)</span>
<span class="kw">public</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">String</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">getWeather</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="typ">String</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">city</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="kw">return</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">fetchFromSlowApi</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="txt">city</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="pun">}</span></code></pre></div></div>

  flex: 1;
  font-size: 15px;
  line-height: 24px;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col-divider {
  align-self: stretch;
  position: relative;
  width: 1px;
  background: #1d3b53;
  flex: 0 0 auto;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col-divider::after {
  content: "\2192";
  position: absolute;
  top: 50%;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
  width: 30px;
  height: 30px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: #011627;
  border: 1px solid #1d3b53;
  color: #82aaff;
  font-size: 16px;
}

<div class="carbon"><div class="carbon-titlebar"><span class="carbon-dot red"></span><span class="carbon-dot yellow"></span><span class="carbon-dot green"></span><span class="carbon-module">springboot-redis-cache-demo</span></div><div class="carbon-editor"><pre><code><span class="kw">return</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">RedisCacheConfiguration</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">defaultCacheConfig</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">entryTtl</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="typ">Duration</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">ofMinutes</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="num">5</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">)</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">disableCachingNullValues</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span></code></pre></div></div>
