Architecture — diagrams.net

Code — CodePen pen

html, body {
  margin: 0;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  min-height: 100vh;
  box-sizing: border-box;
}
body {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: stretch;
  justify-content: stretch;
  padding: 0.5rem;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
}
.carbon {
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  width: 100%;
  min-height: calc(100vh - 1rem);
  max-width: none;
  border-radius: 10px;
  box-shadow: 0 12px 48px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
  overflow: hidden;
}
.carbon-titlebar {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
  height: 36px;
  padding: 0 16px;
  background: #252836;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.carbon-dot {
  width: 12px;
  height: 12px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.carbon-dot.red { background: #ff5f56; }
.carbon-dot.yellow { background: #ffbd2e; }
.carbon-dot.green { background: #27c93f; }
.carbon-module {
  margin-left: auto;
  font: 13px/1 system-ui, sans-serif;
  color: #8b949e;
  letter-spacing: 0.02em;
}
.carbon-editor {
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  min-height: 0;
  background: #011627;
  padding: 1.5rem 2rem 1.75rem;
  overflow: auto;
}
.carbon-editor pre {
  margin: 0;
  flex: 1;
  font-family: "Fira Code", "JetBrains Mono", Consolas, monospace;
  font-size: 18px;
  line-height: 30px;
  white-space: pre;
  tab-size: 4;
}
.carbon-editor .kw { color: #c792ea; }
.carbon-editor .ann { color: #ffb86c; }
.carbon-editor .str { color: #c3e88d; }
.carbon-editor .typ { color: #ffcb6b; }
.carbon-editor .met { color: #82aaff; }
.carbon-editor .com { color: #5c6370; }
.carbon-editor .num { color: #f78c6c; }
.carbon-editor .pun { color: #89ddff; }
.carbon-editor .txt { color: #d6deeb; }
.carbon-editor.cols {
  flex-direction: row;
  gap: 1.75rem;
  align-items: stretch;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col {
  flex: 1 1 0;
  min-width: 0;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col pre {
  flex: 1;
  font-size: 15px;
  line-height: 24px;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col-divider {
  align-self: stretch;
  position: relative;
  width: 1px;
  background: #1d3b53;
  flex: 0 0 auto;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col-divider::after {
  content: "\2192";
  position: absolute;
  top: 50%;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
  width: 30px;
  height: 30px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: #011627;
  border: 1px solid #1d3b53;
  color: #82aaff;
  font-size: 16px;
}

<div class="carbon"><div class="carbon-titlebar"><span class="carbon-dot red"></span><span class="carbon-dot yellow"></span><span class="carbon-dot green"></span><span class="carbon-module">springboot-redis-cache-demo</span></div><div class="carbon-editor"><pre><code><span class="com">// 🚀Spring Boot: Plug in Redis (or another provider) without changing business logic.</span>

<span class="com">// ✅ Plug in Redis (or another provider) without changing business logic</span>

<div class="carbon"><div class="carbon-titlebar"><span class="carbon-dot red"></span><span class="carbon-dot yellow"></span><span class="carbon-dot green"></span><span class="carbon-module">cors-demo</span></div><div class="carbon-editor"><pre><code><span class="txt">registry</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">addMapping</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">&quot;/**&quot;</span><span class="pun">)</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">allowedOrigins</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">&quot;http://localhost:3000&quot;</span><span class="pun">)</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">allowedMethods</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">&quot;GET&quot;</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="str">&quot;POST&quot;</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="str">&quot;PUT&quot;</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="str">&quot;DELETE&quot;</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="str">&quot;OPTIONS&quot;</span><span class="pun">)</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">allowCredentials</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="kw">true</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span></code></pre></div></div>

<div class="carbon"><div class="carbon-titlebar"><span class="carbon-dot red"></span><span class="carbon-dot yellow"></span><span class="carbon-dot green"></span><span class="carbon-module">spring-batch-csv-sample</span></div><div class="carbon-editor"><pre><code><span class="kw">return</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">new</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">StepBuilder</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">&quot;step&quot;</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">jobRepository</span><span class="pun">)</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="pun">&lt;</span><span class="typ">Person</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">Person</span><span class="pun">&gt;</span><span class="met">chunk</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="num">5</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">transactionManager</span><span class="pun">)</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">reader</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="met">reader</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">)</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">processor</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="met">processor</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">)</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">writer</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="met">writer</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">)</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">build</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span></code></pre></div></div>

Tweet #35

Architecture — diagrams.net

Code — CodePen pen

html, body {
  margin: 0;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  min-height: 100vh;
  box-sizing: border-box;
}
body {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: stretch;
  justify-content: stretch;
  padding: 0.5rem;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
}
.carbon {
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  width: 100%;
  min-height: calc(100vh - 1rem);
  max-width: none;
  border-radius: 10px;
  box-shadow: 0 12px 48px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
  overflow: hidden;
}
.carbon-titlebar {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
  height: 36px;
  padding: 0 16px;
  background: #252836;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.carbon-dot {
  width: 12px;
  height: 12px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.carbon-dot.red { background: #ff5f56; }
.carbon-dot.yellow { background: #ffbd2e; }
.carbon-dot.green { background: #27c93f; }
.carbon-module {
  margin-left: auto;
  font: 13px/1 system-ui, sans-serif;
  color: #8b949e;
  letter-spacing: 0.02em;
}
.carbon-editor {
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  min-height: 0;
  background: #011627;
  padding: 1.5rem 2rem 1.75rem;
  overflow: auto;
}
.carbon-editor pre {
  margin: 0;
  flex: 1;
  font-family: "Fira Code", "JetBrains Mono", Consolas, monospace;
  font-size: 18px;
  line-height: 30px;
  white-space: pre;
  tab-size: 4;
}
.carbon-editor .kw { color: #c792ea; }
.carbon-editor .ann { color: #ffb86c; }
.carbon-editor .str { color: #c3e88d; }
.carbon-editor .typ { color: #ffcb6b; }
.carbon-editor .met { color: #82aaff; }
.carbon-editor .com { color: #5c6370; }
.carbon-editor .num { color: #f78c6c; }
.carbon-editor .pun { color: #89ddff; }
.carbon-editor .txt { color: #d6deeb; }
.carbon-editor.cols {
  flex-direction: row;
  gap: 1.75rem;
  align-items: stretch;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col {
  flex: 1 1 0;
  min-width: 0;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col pre {
  flex: 1;
  font-size: 15px;
  line-height: 24px;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col-divider {
  align-self: stretch;
  position: relative;
  width: 1px;
  background: #1d3b53;
  flex: 0 0 auto;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col-divider::after {
  content: "\2192";
  position: absolute;
  top: 50%;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
  width: 30px;
  height: 30px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: #011627;
  border: 1px solid #1d3b53;
  color: #82aaff;
  font-size: 16px;
}

<div class="carbon"><div class="carbon-titlebar"><span class="carbon-dot red"></span><span class="carbon-dot yellow"></span><span class="carbon-dot green"></span><span class="carbon-module">spring-batch-csv-sample</span></div><div class="carbon-editor"><pre><code><span class="com">// 🚀Spring Boot: FlatFileItemReaderBuilder + linesToSkip(1) skips the CSV header.</span>
<span class="com">//</span>
<span class="com">// ✅ FlatFileItemReaderBuilder + linesToSkip(1) skips the CSV header</span>
<span class="com">// ✅ Runnable sample: `spring-batch-csv-sample`</span>
<span class="com">// ✅ Architecture diagram + Carbon CodePen below</span></code></pre></div></div>

<div class="carbon"><div class="carbon-titlebar"><span class="carbon-dot red"></span><span class="carbon-dot yellow"></span><span class="carbon-dot green"></span><span class="carbon-module">spring-batch-csv-sample</span></div><div class="carbon-editor"><pre><code><span class="kw">return</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">person</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">-</span><span class="pun">&gt;</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="txt">person</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">setName</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="txt">person</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">getName</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">toUpperCase</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="kw">return</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">person</span><span class="pun">;</span>

<div class="carbon"><div class="carbon-titlebar"><span class="carbon-dot red"></span><span class="carbon-dot yellow"></span><span class="carbon-dot green"></span><span class="carbon-module">spring-csv-sample</span></div><div class="carbon-editor"><pre><code><span class="kw">try</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="typ">Reader</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">reader</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">Files</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">newBufferedReader</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="txt">path</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="txt">     </span><span class="typ">CSVParser</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">parser</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">new</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">CSVParser</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="txt">reader</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">CSVFormat</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="typ">DEFAULT</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">withHeader</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="kw">for</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="typ">CSVRecord</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">record</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">:</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">parser</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>
<span class="txt">        </span><span class="typ">String</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">name</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">record</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">get</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">&quot;name&quot;</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="pun">}</span>
<span class="pun">}</span></code></pre></div></div>

}

<div class="carbon"><div class="carbon-titlebar"><span class="carbon-dot red"></span><span class="carbon-dot yellow"></span><span class="carbon-dot green"></span><span class="carbon-module">spring-mock-reset-example</span></div><div class="carbon-editor"><pre><code><span class="ann">@MockBean</span>
<span class="kw">private</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">MyService</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">myService</span><span class="pun">;</span>

<span class="ann">@Test</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="ann">@Order</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="num">1</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">void</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">testA</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="met">when</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="txt">myService</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">getData</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">thenReturn</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">&quot;A&quot;</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="pun">}</span></code></pre></div></div>

🚀Spring Boot: @MockBean stubs can leak between tests unless you reset them. ✅ @MockBean stubs can leak between tests unless you reset them ✅ Runnable sample: `spring-mock-reset-example` ✅ Architecture diagram + Carbon CodePen below

.drawio diagram · CodePen preview · Source .java

.carbon-editor .pun { color: #89ddff; }
.carbon-editor .txt { color: #d6deeb; }
.carbon-editor.cols {
  flex-direction: row;
  gap: 1.75rem;
  align-items: stretch;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col {
  flex: 1 1 0;
  min-width: 0;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col pre {
  flex: 1;
  font-size: 15px;
  line-height: 24px;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col-divider {
  align-self: stretch;
  position: relative;
  width: 1px;
  background: #1d3b53;
  flex: 0 0 auto;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col-divider::after {
  content: "\2192";
  position: absolute;
  top: 50%;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
  width: 30px;
  height: 30px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: #011627;
  border: 1px solid #1d3b53;
  color: #82aaff;
  font-size: 16px;
}

<div class="carbon"><div class="carbon-titlebar"><span class="carbon-dot red"></span><span class="carbon-dot yellow"></span><span class="carbon-dot green"></span><span class="carbon-module">spring-mock-reset-example</span></div><div class="carbon-editor"><pre><code><span class="com">// 🚀Spring Boot: @SpringBootTest loads the full context — use when you need integration truth.</span>

html, body {
  margin: 0;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  min-height: 100vh;
  box-sizing: border-box;
}
body {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: stretch;
  justify-content: stretch;
  padding: 0.5rem;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
}
.carbon {
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  width: 100%;
  min-height: calc(100vh - 1rem);
  max-width: none;
  border-radius: 10px;
  box-shadow: 0 12px 48px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
  overflow: hidden;
}
.carbon-titlebar {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
  height: 36px;
  padding: 0 16px;
  background: #252836;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.carbon-dot {
  width: 12px;
  height: 12px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.carbon-dot.red { background: #ff5f56; }
.carbon-dot.yellow { background: #ffbd2e; }
.carbon-dot.green { background: #27c93f; }
.carbon-module {
  margin-left: auto;
  font: 13px/1 system-ui, sans-serif;
  color: #8b949e;
  letter-spacing: 0.02em;
}
.carbon-editor {
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  min-height: 0;
  background: #011627;
  padding: 1.5rem 2rem 1.75rem;
  overflow: auto;
}
.carbon-editor pre {
  margin: 0;
  flex: 1;
  font-family: "Fira Code", "JetBrains Mono", Consolas, monospace;
  font-size: 18px;
  line-height: 30px;
  white-space: pre;
  tab-size: 4;
}
.carbon-editor .kw { color: #c792ea; }
.carbon-editor .ann { color: #ffb86c; }
.carbon-editor .str { color: #c3e88d; }
.carbon-editor .typ { color: #ffcb6b; }
.carbon-editor .met { color: #82aaff; }
.carbon-editor .com { color: #5c6370; }
.carbon-editor .num { color: #f78c6c; }
.carbon-editor .pun { color: #89ddff; }
.carbon-editor .txt { color: #d6deeb; }
.carbon-editor.cols {
  flex-direction: row;
  gap: 1.75rem;
  align-items: stretch;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col {
  flex: 1 1 0;
  min-width: 0;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col pre {
  flex: 1;
  font-size: 15px;
  line-height: 24px;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col-divider {
  align-self: stretch;
  position: relative;
  width: 1px;
  background: #1d3b53;
  flex: 0 0 auto;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col-divider::after {
  content: "\2192";
  position: absolute;
  top: 50%;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
  width: 30px;
  height: 30px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: #011627;
  border: 1px solid #1d3b53;
  color: #82aaff;
  font-size: 16px;
}

<span class="txt">    </span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">email</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">&quot;mary@example.com&quot;</span><span class="pun">)</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">address</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">&quot;Italy&quot;</span><span class="pun">)</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">build</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span></code></pre></div></div>

<span class="txt">map</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">put</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="num">1</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="str">&quot;First&quot;</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="txt">map</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">put</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="num">2</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="str">&quot;Second&quot;</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span></code></pre></div></div>

  font-size: 16px;
}

<div class="carbon"><div class="carbon-titlebar"><span class="carbon-dot red"></span><span class="carbon-dot yellow"></span><span class="carbon-dot green"></span><span class="carbon-module">java-miscellaneous-tips</span></div><div class="carbon-editor"><pre><code><span class="typ">DecimalFormatSymbols</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">symbols</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">new</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">DecimalFormatSymbols</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="typ">Locale</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="typ">ITALY</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="typ">DecimalFormat</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">df</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">new</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">DecimalFormat</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">&quot;#,###.##&quot;</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">symbols</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span></code></pre></div></div>

Open pen preview · New pen on CodePen

💡 Don't assume . is always the decimal separator. ✅ Don't assume . is always the decimal separator ✅ Runnable sample: `java-miscellaneous-tips` ✅ Architecture diagram + Carbon CodePen below

.drawio diagram · CodePen preview · Source .java

Tweet #45

Architecture — diagrams.net

Code — CodePen pen

html, body {
  margin: 0;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  min-height: 100vh;
  box-sizing: border-box;
}
body {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: stretch;
  justify-content: stretch;
  padding: 0.5rem;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
}
.carbon {
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  width: 100%;
  min-height: calc(100vh - 1rem);
  max-width: none;
  border-radius: 10px;
  box-shadow: 0 12px 48px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
  overflow: hidden;
}
.carbon-titlebar {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
  height: 36px;
  padding: 0 16px;
  background: #252836;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.carbon-dot {
  width: 12px;
  height: 12px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.carbon-dot.red { background: #ff5f56; }
.carbon-dot.yellow { background: #ffbd2e; }
.carbon-dot.green { background: #27c93f; }
.carbon-module {
  margin-left: auto;
  font: 13px/1 system-ui, sans-serif;
  color: #8b949e;
  letter-spacing: 0.02em;
}
.carbon-editor {
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  min-height: 0;
  background: #011627;
  padding: 1.5rem 2rem 1.75rem;
  overflow: auto;
}
.carbon-editor pre {
  margin: 0;
  flex: 1;
  font-family: "Fira Code", "JetBrains Mono", Consolas, monospace;
  font-size: 18px;
  line-height: 30px;
  white-space: pre;
  tab-size: 4;
}
.carbon-editor .kw { color: #c792ea; }
.carbon-editor .ann { color: #ffb86c; }
.carbon-editor .str { color: #c3e88d; }
.carbon-editor .typ { color: #ffcb6b; }
.carbon-editor .met { color: #82aaff; }
.carbon-editor .com { color: #5c6370; }
.carbon-editor .num { color: #f78c6c; }
.carbon-editor .pun { color: #89ddff; }
.carbon-editor .txt { color: #d6deeb; }
.carbon-editor.cols {
  flex-direction: row;
  gap: 1.75rem;
  align-items: stretch;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col {
  flex: 1 1 0;
  min-width: 0;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col pre {
  flex: 1;
  font-size: 15px;
  line-height: 24px;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col-divider {
  align-self: stretch;
  position: relative;
  width: 1px;
  background: #1d3b53;
  flex: 0 0 auto;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col-divider::after {
  content: "\2192";
  position: absolute;
  top: 50%;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
  width: 30px;
  height: 30px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: #011627;
  border: 1px solid #1d3b53;
  color: #82aaff;
  font-size: 16px;
}

<div class="carbon"><div class="carbon-titlebar"><span class="carbon-dot red"></span><span class="carbon-dot yellow"></span><span class="carbon-dot green"></span><span class="carbon-module">java-miscellaneous-tips</span></div><div class="carbon-editor"><pre><code><span class="typ">Main</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">deepClone</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="typ">Main</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">super</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">clone</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="txt">deepClone</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">setDependency</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="typ">Dependency</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">this</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="txt">dependency</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">clone</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span></code></pre></div></div>

Open pen preview · New pen on CodePen

💡 Know the difference between shallow and deep clone. ✅ Know the difference between shallow and deep clone ✅ Runnable sample: `java-miscellaneous-tips` ✅ Architecture diagram + Carbon CodePen below

.drawio diagram · CodePen preview · Source .java

<div class="carbon"><div class="carbon-titlebar"><span class="carbon-dot red"></span><span class="carbon-dot yellow"></span><span class="carbon-dot green"></span><span class="carbon-module">spring-boot-minimal-rest-h2</span></div><div class="carbon-editor cols"><div class="col"><pre><code><span class="com">// 1) JPA entity mapped to a table in the H2 database</span>
<span class="ann">@Entity</span>
<span class="ann">@Table</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="txt">name</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="str">&quot;Book&quot;</span><span class="pun">)</span>
<span class="kw">public</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">class</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">Book</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="ann">@Id</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">private</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">String</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">id</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="kw">private</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">String</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">title</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="kw">private</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">String</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">author</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="com">// getters / setters omitted</span>
<span class="pun">}</span>

<span class="com">// 2) Repository — extend JpaRepository for full CRUD, add finders as needed</span>
<span class="ann">@Repository</span>
<span class="kw">public</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">interface</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">BookRepository</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">extends</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">JpaRepository</span><span class="pun">&lt;</span><span class="typ">Book</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">String</span><span class="pun">&gt;</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="typ">List</span><span class="pun">&lt;</span><span class="typ">Book</span><span class="pun">&gt;</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">findByAuthor</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="typ">String</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">author</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="pun">}</span></code></pre></div><span class="col-divider"></span><div class="col"><pre><code><span class="com">// 3) REST controller exposes the CRUD over HTTP</span>
<span class="ann">@RestController</span>
<span class="ann">@RequestMapping</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">&quot;/library&quot;</span><span class="pun">)</span>
<span class="kw">public</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">class</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">BookController</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>

<span class="txt">    </span><span class="ann">@Autowired</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="kw">private</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">BookService</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">books</span><span class="pun">;</span>

<span class="txt">    </span><span class="ann">@GetMapping</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">&quot;/book&quot;</span><span class="pun">)</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="kw">public</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">List</span><span class="pun">&lt;</span><span class="typ">Book</span><span class="pun">&gt;</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">findAll</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">return</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">books</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">findAll</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">}</span>

<span class="txt">    </span><span class="ann">@PostMapping</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">&quot;/book&quot;</span><span class="pun">)</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="kw">public</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">Book</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">add</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="ann">@RequestBody</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">Book</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">book</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">return</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">books</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">save</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="txt">book</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">}</span>

<span class="txt">    </span><span class="ann">@DeleteMapping</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">&quot;/book/{id}&quot;</span><span class="pun">)</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="kw">public</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">void</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">delete</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="ann">@PathVariable</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">String</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">id</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">books</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">deleteById</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="txt">id</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">}</span>
<span class="pun">}</span>

<span class="com">// 4) application.yaml — in-memory H2, nothing to install</span>
<span class="com">// spring.datasource.url: jdbc:h2:mem:mydb</span>
<span class="com">// spring.sql.init.mode: always       # auto-runs schema.sql + import.sql</span>
<span class="com">// spring.h2.console.enabled: true    # browse data at /h2-console</span></code></pre></div></div></div>

Open pen preview · New pen on CodePen

🚀Spring Boot: A full REST API on an H2 in-memory database — no Docker, nothing to install. ✅ H2 lives inside the app's memory: the database is created on startup and thrown away on shutdown — ideal for demos and tests ✅ Extend JpaRepository and you get full CRUD (list, fetch, create, update, delete) without writing SQL ✅ Just run the app — the schema and sample rows load automatically, and you can browse them at /h2-console

.drawio diagram · CodePen preview · Source .java

Tweet #49

Architecture — diagrams.net

Code — CodePen pen

html, body {
  margin: 0;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  min-height: 100vh;
  box-sizing: border-box;
}
body {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: stretch;
  justify-content: stretch;
  padding: 0.5rem;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
}
.carbon {
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  width: 100%;
  min-height: calc(100vh - 1rem);
  max-width: none;
  border-radius: 10px;
  box-shadow: 0 12px 48px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
  overflow: hidden;
}
.carbon-titlebar {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
  height: 36px;
  padding: 0 16px;
  background: #252836;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.carbon-dot {
  width: 12px;
  height: 12px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.carbon-dot.red { background: #ff5f56; }
.carbon-dot.yellow { background: #ffbd2e; }
.carbon-dot.green { background: #27c93f; }
.carbon-module {
  margin-left: auto;
  font: 13px/1 system-ui, sans-serif;
  color: #8b949e;
  letter-spacing: 0.02em;
}
.carbon-editor {
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  min-height: 0;
  background: #011627;
  padding: 1.5rem 2rem 1.75rem;
  overflow: auto;
}
.carbon-editor pre {
  margin: 0;
  flex: 1;
  font-family: "Fira Code", "JetBrains Mono", Consolas, monospace;
  font-size: 18px;
  line-height: 30px;
  white-space: pre;
  tab-size: 4;
}
.carbon-editor .kw { color: #c792ea; }
.carbon-editor .ann { color: #ffb86c; }
.carbon-editor .str { color: #c3e88d; }
.carbon-editor .typ { color: #ffcb6b; }
.carbon-editor .met { color: #82aaff; }
.carbon-editor .com { color: #5c6370; }
.carbon-editor .num { color: #f78c6c; }
.carbon-editor .pun { color: #89ddff; }
.carbon-editor .txt { color: #d6deeb; }
.carbon-editor.cols {
  flex-direction: row;
  gap: 1.75rem;
  align-items: stretch;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col {
  flex: 1 1 0;
  min-width: 0;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col pre {
  flex: 1;
  font-size: 15px;
  line-height: 24px;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col-divider {
  align-self: stretch;
  position: relative;
  width: 1px;
  background: #1d3b53;
  flex: 0 0 auto;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col-divider::after {
  content: "\2192";
  position: absolute;
  top: 50%;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
  width: 30px;
  height: 30px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: #011627;
  border: 1px solid #1d3b53;
  color: #82aaff;
  font-size: 16px;
}

<div class="carbon"><div class="carbon-titlebar"><span class="carbon-dot red"></span><span class="carbon-dot yellow"></span><span class="carbon-dot green"></span><span class="carbon-module">spring-cloud-config-native-server</span></div><div class="carbon-editor"><pre><code><span class="com">// ── 1) Config Server: one place serves every service&#x27;s config ──</span>
<span class="ann">@SpringBootApplication</span>
<span class="ann">@EnableConfigServer</span>
<span class="kw">public</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">class</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">ConfigServerApp</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="kw">public</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">static</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">void</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">main</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="typ">String</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">args</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>
<span class="txt">        </span><span class="kw">new</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">SpringApplicationBuilder</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="typ">ConfigServerApp</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="kw">class</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">run</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="txt">args</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="pun">}</span>
<span class="pun">}</span>

<span class="com">// ── 2) Server application.yaml (serve files from the classpath) ──</span>
<span class="com">// spring.profiles.active: native        # local files, no git needed</span>
<span class="com">// spring.cloud.config.server.native.search-locations: classpath:/config</span>
<span class="com">// server.port: 8888</span>

<span class="com">// ── 3) /config/client-service.yaml (config for &quot;client-service&quot;) ──</span>
<span class="com">// myproperty: value</span>

<span class="com">// ── 4) Client: import config from the server at startup ──</span>
<span class="com">// spring.application.name: client-service</span>
<span class="com">// spring.config.import: optional:configserver:http://localhost:8888</span>

<span class="ann">@Component</span>
<span class="kw">public</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">class</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">GreetingClient</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="ann">@Value</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">&quot;${myproperty}&quot;</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt">               </span><span class="com">// resolved from the Config Server</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="kw">private</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">String</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">myProperty</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="pun">}</span></code></pre></div></div>

Open pen preview · New pen on CodePen

🚀Spring Cloud: Centralize config with Spring Cloud Config before you copy application.properties everywhere. ✅ Centralize config with Spring Cloud Config before you copy application.properties everywhere ✅ Runnable sample: `spring-cloud-config-native-server` ✅ Architecture diagram + Carbon CodePen below

.drawio diagram · CodePen preview · Source .java

html, body {
  margin: 0;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  min-height: 100vh;
  box-sizing: border-box;
}
body {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: stretch;
  justify-content: stretch;
  padding: 0.5rem;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
}
.carbon {
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  width: 100%;
  min-height: calc(100vh - 1rem);
  max-width: none;
  border-radius: 10px;
  box-shadow: 0 12px 48px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
  overflow: hidden;
}
.carbon-titlebar {
  display: flex;

  padding: 0 16px;

}

  font-size: 18px;

  white-space: pre;

}

.carbon-editor .ann { color: #ffb86c; }
.carbon-editor .str { color: #c3e88d; }

.carbon-editor .met { color: #82aaff; }
.carbon-editor .com { color: #5c6370; }
.carbon-editor .num { color: #f78c6c; }

<div class="carbon"><div class="carbon-titlebar"><span class="carbon-dot red"></span><span class="carbon-dot yellow"></span><span class="carbon-dot green"></span><span class="carbon-module">spring-cloud-discovery</span></div><div class="carbon-editor"><pre><code><span class="com">// 1) Eureka Server — service registry</span>
<span class="ann">@SpringBootApplication</span>
<span class="ann">@EnableEurekaServer</span>
<span class="kw">public</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">class</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">DiscoveryServerApp</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="kw">public</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">static</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">void</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">main</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="typ">String</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">args</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>
<span class="txt">        </span><span class="typ">SpringApplication</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">run</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="typ">DiscoveryServerApp</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="kw">class</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">args</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="pun">}</span>
<span class="pun">}</span>

<span class="com">// 2) Microservice — registers as &quot;books-service&quot;</span>
<span class="com">// application.yml → spring.application.name: books-service</span>

<span class="ann">@FeignClient</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="txt">name</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="str">&quot;author-service&quot;</span><span class="pun">)</span>
<span class="kw">public</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">interface</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">AuthorClient</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="ann">@GetMapping</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">&quot;/authors/{id}&quot;</span><span class="pun">)</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="typ">Author</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">getAuthor</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="ann">@PathVariable</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">String</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">id</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="pun">}</span></code></pre></div></div>

Open pen preview · New pen on CodePen

🚀Spring Cloud: Eureka service discovery — call services by name, not IP. ✅ Each service registers with Eureka on startup (spring.application.name) ✅ Eureka tracks healthy instances via heartbeats ✅ Clients call http://author-service/... — LoadBalancer resolves the name to a live instance

.drawio diagram · CodePen preview · Source .java

html, body {
  margin: 0;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  min-height: 100vh;
  box-sizing: border-box;
}
body {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: stretch;
  justify-content: stretch;
  padding: 0.5rem;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
}
.carbon {
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  width: 100%;
  min-height: calc(100vh - 1rem);
  max-width: none;
  border-radius: 10px;
  box-shadow: 0 12px 48px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);

}
.carbon-titlebar {
  display: flex;

<div class="carbon"><div class="carbon-titlebar"><span class="carbon-dot red"></span><span class="carbon-dot yellow"></span><span class="carbon-dot green"></span><span class="carbon-module">libraryapp-openfeign-discovery-circuitbreaker</span></div><div class="carbon-editor"><pre><code><span class="ann">@FeignClient</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="txt">name</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="str">&quot;author-service&quot;</span><span class="pun">)</span>
<span class="kw">public</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">interface</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">AuthorClient</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>

<span class="txt">    </span><span class="ann">@GetMapping</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">&quot;/authors/getInstance&quot;</span><span class="pun">)</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="ann">@CircuitBreaker</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="txt">name</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="str">&quot;CircuitBreakerService&quot;</span><span class="pun">)</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="typ">String</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">getInstance</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="pun">}</span>

<span class="ann">@RestController</span>
<span class="kw">public</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">class</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">BookController</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>

<span class="txt">    </span><span class="ann">@GetMapping</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">&quot;/getAuthorServiceInstance&quot;</span><span class="pun">)</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="ann">@CircuitBreaker</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="txt">name</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="str">&quot;CircuitBreakerApi&quot;</span><span class="pun">,</span>
<span class="txt">                    </span><span class="txt">fallbackMethod</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="str">&quot;getAuthorServiceInstanceFallback&quot;</span><span class="pun">)</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="kw">public</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">String</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">getAuthorServiceInstance</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>
<span class="txt">        </span><span class="kw">return</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">bookService</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">getAuthorServiceInstance</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="pun">}</span>

<span class="txt">    </span><span class="kw">public</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">String</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">getAuthorServiceInstanceFallback</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="typ">Exception</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">ex</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>
<span class="txt">        </span><span class="kw">return</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="str">&quot;Fallback content&quot;</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="pun">}</span>
<span class="pun">}</span>

<span class="com">// application.yml</span>
<span class="com">// resilience4j.circuitbreaker.instances.CircuitBreakerApi:</span>
<span class="com">//   failure-rate-threshold: 50</span>
<span class="com">//   wait-duration-in-open-state: 5s</span></code></pre></div></div>

Open pen preview · New pen on CodePen

🚀Spring Cloud: OpenFeign + Circuit Breaker — resilience isn't an afterthought. ✅ @FeignClient calls remote services by name (via Eureka + LoadBalancer) ✅ @CircuitBreaker stops calling a failing service after a threshold ✅ fallbackMethod returns a safe default while the circuit is OPEN

.drawio diagram · CodePen preview · Source .java

  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: #011627;
  border: 1px solid #1d3b53;
  color: #82aaff;
  font-size: 16px;
}

<div class="carbon"><div class="carbon-titlebar"><span class="carbon-dot red"></span><span class="carbon-dot yellow"></span><span class="carbon-dot green"></span><span class="carbon-module">spring-cloud-sample-libraryapp</span></div><div class="carbon-editor cols"><div class="col"><pre><code><span class="com">// ── CONSUMER (books-service): declare what you expect from author-service ──</span>
<span class="ann">@ExtendWith</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="typ">PactConsumerTestExt</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="kw">class</span><span class="pun">)</span>
<span class="kw">class</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">AuthorClientContractTest</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>

<span class="txt">    </span><span class="ann">@Pact</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="txt">consumer</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="str">&quot;books-service&quot;</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">provider</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="str">&quot;author-service&quot;</span><span class="pun">)</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="typ">V4Pact</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">getAuthor</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="typ">PactDslWithProvider</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">builder</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>
<span class="txt">        </span><span class="kw">return</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">builder</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">given</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">&quot;author Goethe exists&quot;</span><span class="pun">)</span>
<span class="txt">            </span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">uponReceiving</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">&quot;GET author by name&quot;</span><span class="pun">)</span>
<span class="txt">                </span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">path</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">&quot;/authors/findAuthor&quot;</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">query</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">&quot;name=Goethe&quot;</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">method</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">&quot;GET&quot;</span><span class="pun">)</span>
<span class="txt">            </span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">willRespondWith</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span>
<span class="txt">                </span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">status</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="num">200</span><span class="pun">)</span>
<span class="txt">                </span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">body</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">&quot;{\&quot;name\&quot;:\&quot;Goethe\&quot;,\&quot;biography\&quot;:\&quot;Bio info\&quot;}&quot;</span><span class="pun">)</span>
<span class="txt">            </span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">toPact</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="typ">V4Pact</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="kw">class</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="pun">}</span>

<span class="txt">    </span><span class="ann">@Test</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="ann">@PactTestFor</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="txt">pactMethod</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="str">&quot;getAuthor&quot;</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt">        </span><span class="com">// runs against a mock provider</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="kw">void</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">callsAuthorService</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="typ">MockServer</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">mock</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>
<span class="txt">        </span><span class="typ">String</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">body</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">new</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">RestTemplate</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">getForObject</span><span class="pun">(</span>
<span class="txt">            </span><span class="txt">mock</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">getUrl</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">+</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="str">&quot;/authors/findAuthor?name=Goethe&quot;</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">String</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="kw">class</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="txt">        </span><span class="met">assertEquals</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">&quot;{\&quot;name\&quot;:\&quot;Goethe\&quot;,\&quot;biography\&quot;:\&quot;Bio info\&quot;}&quot;</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">body</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="pun">}</span>
<span class="pun">}</span></code></pre></div><span class="col-divider"></span><div class="col"><pre><code><span class="com">// ── PROVIDER (author-service): prove the real service honours the contract ──</span>
<span class="ann">@Provider</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">&quot;author-service&quot;</span><span class="pun">)</span>
<span class="ann">@SpringBootTest</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="txt">webEnvironment</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">RANDOM_PORT</span><span class="pun">)</span>
<span class="ann">@PactBroker</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="txt">url</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="str">&quot;http://localhost:9292&quot;</span><span class="pun">)</span>
<span class="kw">class</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">AuthorProviderPactTest</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>

<span class="txt">    </span><span class="ann">@TestTemplate</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="ann">@ExtendWith</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="typ">PactVerificationInvocationContextProvider</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="kw">class</span><span class="pun">)</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="kw">void</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">verifyContracts</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="typ">PactVerificationContext</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">ctx</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>
<span class="txt">        </span><span class="txt">ctx</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">verifyInteraction</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="txt">                  </span><span class="com">// replay contract on the real app</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="pun">}</span>
<span class="pun">}</span></code></pre></div></div></div>

Open pen preview · New pen on CodePen

🚀Spring Cloud: Contract testing with Pact — make sure two services still agree on their API. ✅ The consumer writes down the response it expects and tests against a mock — the real provider doesn't need to be running ✅ The provider replays that same contract against the real app and fails if it no longer matches ✅ Each side is verified separately, so a breaking change shows up long before deployment

.drawio diagram · CodePen preview · Source .java

Tweet #53

Architecture — diagrams.net

Code — CodePen pen

html, body {
  margin: 0;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  min-height: 100vh;
  box-sizing: border-box;
}
body {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: stretch;
  justify-content: stretch;
  padding: 0.5rem;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
}
.carbon {
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  width: 100%;
  min-height: calc(100vh - 1rem);
  max-width: none;
  border-radius: 10px;
  box-shadow: 0 12px 48px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
  overflow: hidden;
}
.carbon-titlebar {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
  height: 36px;
  padding: 0 16px;
  background: #252836;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.carbon-dot {
  width: 12px;
  height: 12px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.carbon-dot.red { background: #ff5f56; }
.carbon-dot.yellow { background: #ffbd2e; }
.carbon-dot.green { background: #27c93f; }
.carbon-module {
  margin-left: auto;
  font: 13px/1 system-ui, sans-serif;
  color: #8b949e;
  letter-spacing: 0.02em;
}
.carbon-editor {
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  min-height: 0;
  background: #011627;
  padding: 1.5rem 2rem 1.75rem;
  overflow: auto;
}
.carbon-editor pre {
  margin: 0;
  flex: 1;
  font-family: "Fira Code", "JetBrains Mono", Consolas, monospace;
  font-size: 18px;
  line-height: 30px;
  white-space: pre;
  tab-size: 4;
}
.carbon-editor .kw { color: #c792ea; }
.carbon-editor .ann { color: #ffb86c; }
.carbon-editor .str { color: #c3e88d; }
.carbon-editor .typ { color: #ffcb6b; }
.carbon-editor .met { color: #82aaff; }
.carbon-editor .com { color: #5c6370; }
.carbon-editor .num { color: #f78c6c; }
.carbon-editor .pun { color: #89ddff; }
.carbon-editor .txt { color: #d6deeb; }
.carbon-editor.cols {
  flex-direction: row;
  gap: 1.75rem;
  align-items: stretch;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col {
  flex: 1 1 0;
  min-width: 0;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col pre {
  flex: 1;
  font-size: 15px;
  line-height: 24px;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col-divider {
  align-self: stretch;
  position: relative;
  width: 1px;
  background: #1d3b53;
  flex: 0 0 auto;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col-divider::after {
  content: "\2192";
  position: absolute;
  top: 50%;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
  width: 30px;
  height: 30px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: #011627;
  border: 1px solid #1d3b53;
  color: #82aaff;
  font-size: 16px;
}

<div class="carbon"><div class="carbon-titlebar"><span class="carbon-dot red"></span><span class="carbon-dot yellow"></span><span class="carbon-dot green"></span><span class="carbon-module">spring-cloud-sample-libraryapp</span></div><div class="carbon-editor"><pre><code><span class="com">// Gatling: load-test the books endpoint and assert SLAs</span>
<span class="kw">public</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">class</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">BookSaveSimulation</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">extends</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">Simulation</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>

<span class="txt">    </span><span class="pun">{</span>
<span class="txt">        </span><span class="met">setUp</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="met">buildScenario</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span>
<span class="txt">            </span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">injectOpen</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="met">rampUsersPerSec</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="num">1</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">to</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="num">100</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">during</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="met">ofSeconds</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="num">300</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">)</span>
<span class="txt">            </span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">protocols</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="txt">http</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">baseUrl</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">&quot;http://localhost:8080&quot;</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">)</span>
<span class="txt">        </span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">assertions</span><span class="pun">(</span>
<span class="txt">            </span><span class="met">global</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">responseTime</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">max</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">lte</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="num">10000</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="txt">            </span><span class="com">// &lt;= 10s</span>
<span class="txt">            </span><span class="met">global</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">successfulRequests</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">percent</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">gt</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="num">90.0</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="txt">   </span><span class="com">// &gt; 90% OK</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="pun">}</span>

<span class="txt">    </span><span class="typ">ScenarioBuilder</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">buildScenario</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>
<span class="txt">        </span><span class="kw">return</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">scenario</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">&quot;Load POST&quot;</span><span class="pun">)</span>
<span class="txt">            </span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">feed</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="met">randomTitles</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt">                  </span><span class="com">// Faker-generated book titles</span>
<span class="txt">            </span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">exec</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="met">http</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">&quot;create-book&quot;</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">post</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">&quot;/library/book&quot;</span><span class="pun">)</span>
<span class="txt">                </span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">header</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">&quot;Content-Type&quot;</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="str">&quot;application/json&quot;</span><span class="pun">)</span>
<span class="txt">                </span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">body</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="met">StringBody</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">&quot;{ \&quot;title\&quot;: \&quot;${title}\&quot; }&quot;</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="pun">}</span>
<span class="pun">}</span></code></pre></div></div>

Open pen preview · New pen on CodePen

🚀Spring Cloud: Load testing with Gatling — check a service survives real traffic. ✅ Describe a scenario (e.g. POST /library/book) and ramp virtual users up over time ✅ Feed randomized data with Faker so every request looks realistic ✅ Assert SLAs on the whole run — fail it if it gets too slow (≤10s) or drops below >90% success

.drawio diagram · CodePen preview · Source .java

body {

.carbon-editor .num { color: #f78c6c; }

<div class="carbon"><div class="carbon-titlebar"><span class="carbon-dot red"></span><span class="carbon-dot yellow"></span><span class="carbon-dot green"></span><span class="carbon-module">java-17-sealed-classes</span></div><div class="carbon-editor"><pre><code><span class="com">// java-17-sealed-classes — closed hierarchy</span>

<span class="kw">public</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">abstract</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">sealed</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">class</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">Shape</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">permits</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">Circle</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">Rectangle</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">FancyRectangle</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="kw">public</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">abstract</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">double</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">area</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="pun">}</span>

<span class="kw">public</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">final</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">class</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">Circle</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">extends</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">Shape</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="com">/* leaf — no further subclasses */</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">}</span>

<span class="kw">public</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">sealed</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">class</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">Rectangle</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">extends</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">Shape</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">permits</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">Square</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">Oblong</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">}</span>

<span class="kw">public</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">final</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">class</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">Square</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">extends</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">Rectangle</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">}</span>

<span class="kw">public</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">non</span><span class="pun">-</span><span class="kw">sealed</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">class</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">FancyRectangle</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">extends</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">Shape</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">}</span>
<span class="com">// RoundedRectangle extends FancyRectangle — not in Shape.permits (open branch)</span></code></pre></div></div>

Open pen preview · New pen on CodePen

💡 Java 17 — sealed types close the inheritance graph with `permits`. ✅ Only listed subtypes may extend the sealed class/interface ✅ Each permitted subtype must be `final`, `sealed`, or `non-sealed` ✅ `non-sealed` is the escape hatch — inheritance opens again below that branch

.drawio diagram · CodePen preview · Source .java

Architecture — diagrams.net

Code — CodePen pen

html, body {
  margin: 0;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  min-height: 100vh;
  box-sizing: border-box;
}
body {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: stretch;
  justify-content: stretch;
  padding: 0.5rem;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
}
.carbon {
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  width: 100%;
  min-height: calc(100vh - 1rem);
  max-width: none;
  border-radius: 10px;
  box-shadow: 0 12px 48px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
  overflow: hidden;
}
.carbon-titlebar {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
  height: 36px;
  padding: 0 16px;
  background: #252836;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.carbon-dot {
  width: 12px;
  height: 12px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.carbon-dot.red { background: #ff5f56; }
.carbon-dot.yellow { background: #ffbd2e; }
.carbon-dot.green { background: #27c93f; }
.carbon-module {
  margin-left: auto;
  font: 13px/1 system-ui, sans-serif;
  color: #8b949e;
  letter-spacing: 0.02em;
}
.carbon-editor {
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  min-height: 0;
  background: #011627;
  padding: 1.5rem 2rem 1.75rem;
  overflow: auto;
}
.carbon-editor pre {
  margin: 0;
  flex: 1;
  font-family: "Fira Code", "JetBrains Mono", Consolas, monospace;
  font-size: 18px;
  line-height: 30px;
  white-space: pre;
  tab-size: 4;
}
.carbon-editor .kw { color: #c792ea; }
.carbon-editor .ann { color: #ffb86c; }
.carbon-editor .str { color: #c3e88d; }
.carbon-editor .typ { color: #ffcb6b; }
.carbon-editor .met { color: #82aaff; }
.carbon-editor .com { color: #5c6370; }
.carbon-editor .num { color: #f78c6c; }
.carbon-editor .pun { color: #89ddff; }
.carbon-editor .txt { color: #d6deeb; }
.carbon-editor.cols {
  flex-direction: row;
  gap: 1.75rem;
  align-items: stretch;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col {
  flex: 1 1 0;
  min-width: 0;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col pre {
  flex: 1;
  font-size: 15px;
  line-height: 24px;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col-divider {
  align-self: stretch;
  position: relative;
  width: 1px;
  background: #1d3b53;
  flex: 0 0 auto;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col-divider::after {
  content: "\2192";
  position: absolute;
  top: 50%;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
  width: 30px;
  height: 30px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: #011627;
  border: 1px solid #1d3b53;
  color: #82aaff;
  font-size: 16px;
}

<div class="carbon"><div class="carbon-titlebar"><span class="carbon-dot red"></span><span class="carbon-dot yellow"></span><span class="carbon-dot green"></span><span class="carbon-module">java-switch-expressions-demo</span></div><div class="carbon-editor"><pre><code><span class="kw">enum</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">Status</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="typ">NEW</span><span class="pun">,</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="typ">RUNNING</span><span class="pun">,</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="typ">DONE</span>
<span class="pun">}</span>

<span class="kw">public</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">static</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">void</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">main</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="typ">String</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">args</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="typ">List</span><span class="pun">&lt;</span><span class="typ">Status</span><span class="pun">&gt;</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">statuses</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">List</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">of</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="typ">Status</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="typ">NEW</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">Status</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="typ">RUNNING</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">Status</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="typ">DONE</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>

<span class="txt">    </span><span class="kw">for</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="typ">Status</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">status</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">:</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">statuses</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>
<span class="txt">        </span><span class="typ">String</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">message</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">toLabel</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="txt">status</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="txt">        </span><span class="typ">System</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="txt">out</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">printf</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">&quot;%s -&gt; %s%n&quot;</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">status</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">message</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="pun">}</span>

<span class="txt">    </span><span class="typ">System</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="txt">out</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">println</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="typ">System</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="txt">out</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">println</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">&quot;Tip: add FAILED to Status and this switch expression&quot;</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="typ">System</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="txt">out</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">println</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">&quot;will not compile until you handle FAILED or add default.&quot;</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="pun">}</span>

<span class="kw">static</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">String</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">toLabel</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="typ">Status</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">status</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="kw">return</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">switch</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="txt">status</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>
<span class="txt">        </span><span class="kw">case</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">NEW</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">-</span><span class="pun">&gt;</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="str">&quot;queued&quot;</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="txt">        </span><span class="kw">case</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">RUNNING</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">-</span><span class="pun">&gt;</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="str">&quot;in progress&quot;</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="txt">        </span><span class="kw">case</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">DONE</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">-</span><span class="pun">&gt;</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="str">&quot;finished&quot;</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="pun">}</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="pun">}</span></code></pre></div></div>

Open pen preview · New pen on CodePen

💡 Java 14+ switch expressions: the compiler checks exhaustiveness for you. ✅ Skip an enum constant → compile error ✅ Fix it by handling every value or adding `default` ✅ Fewer forgotten branches when enums evolve

.drawio diagram · CodePen preview · Source .java
