html, body {
  margin: 0;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  min-height: 100vh;
  box-sizing: border-box;
}
body {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: stretch;
  justify-content: stretch;
  padding: 0.5rem;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
}
.carbon {
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  width: 100%;
  min-height: calc(100vh - 1rem);
  max-width: none;
  border-radius: 10px;
  box-shadow: 0 12px 48px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
  overflow: hidden;
}
.carbon-titlebar {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
  height: 36px;
  padding: 0 16px;
  background: #252836;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.carbon-dot {
  width: 12px;
  height: 12px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.carbon-dot.red { background: #ff5f56; }
.carbon-dot.yellow { background: #ffbd2e; }
.carbon-dot.green { background: #27c93f; }
.carbon-module {
  margin-left: auto;
  font: 13px/1 system-ui, sans-serif;
  color: #8b949e;
  letter-spacing: 0.02em;
}
.carbon-editor {
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  min-height: 0;
  background: #011627;
  padding: 1.5rem 2rem 1.75rem;
  overflow: auto;
}
.carbon-editor pre {
  margin: 0;
  flex: 1;
  font-family: "Fira Code", "JetBrains Mono", Consolas, monospace;
  font-size: 18px;
  line-height: 30px;
  white-space: pre;
  tab-size: 4;
}
.carbon-editor .kw { color: #c792ea; }
.carbon-editor .ann { color: #ffb86c; }
.carbon-editor .str { color: #c3e88d; }
.carbon-editor .typ { color: #ffcb6b; }
.carbon-editor .met { color: #82aaff; }
.carbon-editor .com { color: #5c6370; }
.carbon-editor .num { color: #f78c6c; }
.carbon-editor .pun { color: #89ddff; }
.carbon-editor .txt { color: #d6deeb; }
.carbon-editor.cols {
  flex-direction: row;
  gap: 1.75rem;
  align-items: stretch;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col {
  flex: 1 1 0;
  min-width: 0;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col pre {
  flex: 1;
  font-size: 15px;
  line-height: 24px;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col-divider {
  align-self: stretch;
  position: relative;
  width: 1px;
  background: #1d3b53;
  flex: 0 0 auto;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col-divider::after {
  content: "\2192";
  position: absolute;
  top: 50%;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
  width: 30px;
  height: 30px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: #011627;
  border: 1px solid #1d3b53;
  color: #82aaff;
  font-size: 16px;
}

<div class="carbon"><div class="carbon-titlebar"><span class="carbon-dot red"></span><span class="carbon-dot yellow"></span><span class="carbon-dot green"></span><span class="carbon-module">java-varhandle-fences-demo</span></div><div class="carbon-editor"><pre><code><span class="kw">package</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">com</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="txt">codingstrain</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="txt">varhandle</span><span class="pun">;</span>

<span class="kw">import</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">java</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="txt">lang</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="txt">invoke</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="typ">MethodHandles</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="kw">import</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">java</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="txt">lang</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="txt">invoke</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="typ">VarHandle</span><span class="pun">;</span>

<span class="com">/**</span>
<span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">*</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">Demonstrates</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">VarHandle</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">fence</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">operations</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">that</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">are</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">weaker</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="txt">and</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">cheaper</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">than</span>
<span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">*</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span><span class="ann">@code</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">volatile</span><span class="pun">}</span><span class="pun">:</span>
<span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">*</span>
<span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">*</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">&lt;</span><span class="txt">ul</span><span class="pun">&gt;</span>
<span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">*</span><span class="txt">   </span><span class="pun">&lt;</span><span class="txt">li</span><span class="pun">&gt;</span><span class="pun">{</span><span class="ann">@code</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">setOpaque</span><span class="pun">}</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">—</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">single</span><span class="pun">-</span><span class="txt">writer</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">ordering</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">no</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">full</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">barrier</span><span class="pun">&lt;</span><span class="pun">/</span><span class="txt">li</span><span class="pun">&gt;</span>
<span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">*</span><span class="txt">   </span><span class="pun">&lt;</span><span class="txt">li</span><span class="pun">&gt;</span><span class="pun">{</span><span class="ann">@code</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">setRelease</span><span class="pun">}</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">—</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">publish</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">writes</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="txt">release</span><span class="pun">-</span><span class="txt">store</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">&lt;</span><span class="pun">/</span><span class="txt">li</span><span class="pun">&gt;</span>
<span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">*</span><span class="txt">   </span><span class="pun">&lt;</span><span class="txt">li</span><span class="pun">&gt;</span><span class="pun">{</span><span class="ann">@code</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">getAcquire</span><span class="pun">}</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">—</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">subscribe</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="txt">acquire</span><span class="pun">-</span><span class="txt">load</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">so</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">prior</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">writes</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">are</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">visible</span><span class="pun">&lt;</span><span class="pun">/</span><span class="txt">li</span><span class="pun">&gt;</span>
<span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">*</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">&lt;</span><span class="pun">/</span><span class="txt">ul</span><span class="pun">&gt;</span>
<span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">*</span><span class="pun">/</span>
<span class="kw">public</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">final</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">class</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">VarHandleFencesDemo</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>

<span class="txt">    </span><span class="com">/** Plain field accessed through a VarHandle (no {@code volatile} keyword). */</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="kw">static</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">final</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">class</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">Holder</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>
<span class="txt">        </span><span class="kw">boolean</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">flag</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="txt">        </span><span class="kw">int</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">payload</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="pun">}</span>

<span class="txt">    </span><span class="kw">private</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">static</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">final</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">VarHandle</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">FLAG</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="kw">private</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">static</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">final</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">VarHandle</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">PAYLOAD</span><span class="pun">;</span>

<span class="txt">    </span><span class="kw">static</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>
<span class="txt">        </span><span class="kw">try</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>
<span class="txt">            </span><span class="typ">MethodHandles</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="typ">Lookup</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">lookup</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">MethodHandles</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">lookup</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="txt">            </span><span class="typ">FLAG</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">lookup</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">findVarHandle</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="typ">Holder</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="kw">class</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="str">&quot;flag&quot;</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">boolean</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="kw">class</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="txt">            </span><span class="typ">PAYLOAD</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">lookup</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">findVarHandle</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="typ">Holder</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="kw">class</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="str">&quot;payload&quot;</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">int</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="kw">class</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="txt">        </span><span class="pun">}</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">catch</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="typ">ReflectiveOperationException</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">e</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>
<span class="txt">            </span><span class="kw">throw</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">new</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">ExceptionInInitializerError</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="txt">e</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="txt">        </span><span class="pun">}</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="pun">}</span>

<span class="txt">    </span><span class="kw">public</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">static</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">void</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">main</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="typ">String</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">args</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">throws</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">InterruptedException</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>
<span class="txt">        </span><span class="met">opaqueExample</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="txt">        </span><span class="met">releaseAcquireExample</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="pun">}</span>

<span class="txt">    </span><span class="com">/**</span>
<span class="txt">     </span><span class="pun">*</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span><span class="ann">@code</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">setOpaque</span><span class="pun">}</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">/</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span><span class="ann">@code</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">getOpaque</span><span class="pun">}</span><span class="pun">:</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">guarantees</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">a</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">single</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">writer</span><span class="str">&#x27;s updates</span>
<span class="txt">     </span><span class="pun">*</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">become</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">visible</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">in</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">program</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">order</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">without</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">the</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">stronger</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">barriers</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">of</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">volatile</span><span class="pun">.</span>
<span class="txt">     </span><span class="pun">*</span><span class="pun">/</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="kw">static</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">void</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">opaqueExample</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>
<span class="txt">        </span><span class="typ">Holder</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">holder</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">new</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">Holder</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>

<span class="txt">        </span><span class="typ">FLAG</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">setOpaque</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="txt">holder</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">true</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="txt">        </span><span class="kw">boolean</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">current</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="kw">boolean</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">FLAG</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">getOpaque</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="txt">holder</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>

<span class="txt">        </span><span class="typ">System</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="txt">out</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">println</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">&quot;[opaque] single-writer ordering, flag = &quot;</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">+</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">current</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="pun">}</span>

<span class="txt">    </span><span class="com">/**</span>
<span class="txt">     </span><span class="pun">*</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span><span class="ann">@code</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">setRelease</span><span class="pun">}</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="txt">publish</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">pairs</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">with</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span><span class="ann">@code</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">getAcquire</span><span class="pun">}</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="txt">subscribe</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">:</span>
<span class="txt">     </span><span class="pun">*</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">everything</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">written</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">before</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">the</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">release</span><span class="pun">-</span><span class="txt">store</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">is</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">visible</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">to</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">a</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">thread</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">that</span>
<span class="txt">     </span><span class="pun">*</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">observes</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">the</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">value</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">via</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">an</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">acquire</span><span class="pun">-</span><span class="txt">load</span><span class="pun">.</span>
<span class="txt">     </span><span class="pun">*</span><span class="pun">/</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="kw">static</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">void</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">releaseAcquireExample</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">throws</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">InterruptedException</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>
<span class="txt">        </span><span class="typ">Holder</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">holder</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">new</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">Holder</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>

<span class="txt">        </span><span class="typ">Thread</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">publisher</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">new</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">Thread</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">-</span><span class="pun">&gt;</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>
<span class="txt">            </span><span class="txt">holder</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="txt">payload</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="num">42</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="txt">                 </span><span class="com">// ordinary write</span>
<span class="txt">            </span><span class="typ">FLAG</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">setRelease</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="txt">holder</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">true</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="txt">       </span><span class="com">// publish: release-store</span>
<span class="txt">        </span><span class="pun">}</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="str">&quot;publisher&quot;</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>

<span class="txt">        </span><span class="typ">Thread</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">subscriber</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">new</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">Thread</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">-</span><span class="pun">&gt;</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>
<span class="txt">            </span><span class="kw">while</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">!</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="kw">boolean</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">FLAG</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">getAcquire</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="txt">holder</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>
<span class="txt">                </span><span class="typ">Thread</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">onSpinWait</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="txt">             </span><span class="com">// subscribe: acquire-load</span>
<span class="txt">            </span><span class="pun">}</span>
<span class="txt">            </span><span class="com">// Guaranteed to see payload == 42 because of release/acquire pairing.</span>
<span class="txt">            </span><span class="typ">System</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="txt">out</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">println</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">&quot;[release/acquire] observed payload = &quot;</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">+</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">holder</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="txt">payload</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="txt">        </span><span class="pun">}</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="str">&quot;subscriber&quot;</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>

<span class="txt">        </span><span class="txt">subscriber</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">start</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="txt">        </span><span class="txt">publisher</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">start</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="txt">        </span><span class="txt">publisher</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">join</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="txt">        </span><span class="txt">subscriber</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">join</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="pun">}</span>
<span class="pun">}</span></code></pre></div></div>

Open pen preview · New pen on CodePen

💡 VarHandle fences in plain English (a lighter alternative to `volatile`) 🧵 ✅ When two threads share a variable, the CPU can reorder and cache writes. One thread updates a value, the other keeps seeing the old one. That's the bug VarHandle fences help you avoid. 🧵 ✅ `volatile` fixes it by fully syncing every read and write. Safe, but it's the heavy hammer — often stronger (and slower) than you actually need. 🧵 ✅ setRelease = "publish". The writer says: "I'm done. Everything I wrote before this is now safe to read." Like hitting Save + Publish on a post. 🧵 ✅ getAcquire = "subscribe". The reader says: "Give me the published value — and I'll correctly see everything written before it." Like opening the finished post, never a half-written draft. 🧵 ✅ setRelease + getAcquire work as a pair: if the reader sees the flag, it also sees all the data written before the flag. 🧵 ✅ setOpaque = the cheapest option: "I'm the only writer — just keep my own writes in order." No heavy cross-thread coordination. 🧵 ✅ Bottom line: volatile does all of this at once, but expensively. VarHandle lets you pick only the guarantee you need — handy in hot, performance-critical code. 🧵 #Java #Concurrency #JMM

.drawio diagram · CodePen preview · Source .java

Architecture — diagrams.net

Code — CodePen pen

html, body {
  margin: 0;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  min-height: 100vh;
  box-sizing: border-box;
}
body {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: stretch;
  justify-content: stretch;
  padding: 0.5rem;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
}
.carbon {
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  width: 100%;
  min-height: calc(100vh - 1rem);
  max-width: none;
  border-radius: 10px;
  box-shadow: 0 12px 48px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
  overflow: hidden;
}
.carbon-titlebar {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
  height: 36px;
  padding: 0 16px;
  background: #252836;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.carbon-dot {
  width: 12px;
  height: 12px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.carbon-dot.red { background: #ff5f56; }
.carbon-dot.yellow { background: #ffbd2e; }
.carbon-dot.green { background: #27c93f; }
.carbon-module {
  margin-left: auto;
  font: 13px/1 system-ui, sans-serif;
  color: #8b949e;
  letter-spacing: 0.02em;
}
.carbon-editor {
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  min-height: 0;
  background: #011627;
  padding: 1.5rem 2rem 1.75rem;
  overflow: auto;
}
.carbon-editor pre {
  margin: 0;
  flex: 1;
  font-family: "Fira Code", "JetBrains Mono", Consolas, monospace;
  font-size: 18px;
  line-height: 30px;
  white-space: pre;
  tab-size: 4;
}
.carbon-editor .kw { color: #c792ea; }
.carbon-editor .ann { color: #ffb86c; }
.carbon-editor .str { color: #c3e88d; }
.carbon-editor .typ { color: #ffcb6b; }
.carbon-editor .met { color: #82aaff; }
.carbon-editor .com { color: #5c6370; }
.carbon-editor .num { color: #f78c6c; }
.carbon-editor .pun { color: #89ddff; }
.carbon-editor .txt { color: #d6deeb; }
.carbon-editor.cols {
  flex-direction: row;
  gap: 1.75rem;
  align-items: stretch;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col {
  flex: 1 1 0;
  min-width: 0;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col pre {
  flex: 1;
  font-size: 15px;
  line-height: 24px;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col-divider {
  align-self: stretch;
  position: relative;
  width: 1px;
  background: #1d3b53;
  flex: 0 0 auto;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col-divider::after {
  content: "\2192";
  position: absolute;
  top: 50%;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
  width: 30px;
  height: 30px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: #011627;
  border: 1px solid #1d3b53;
  color: #82aaff;
  font-size: 16px;
}

<div class="carbon"><div class="carbon-titlebar"><span class="carbon-dot red"></span><span class="carbon-dot yellow"></span><span class="carbon-dot green"></span><span class="carbon-module">junit5-extension-api-demo</span></div><div class="carbon-editor cols"><div class="col"><pre><code><span class="kw">package</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">com</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="txt">codingstrain</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="txt">junit5</span><span class="pun">;</span>

<span class="kw">import</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">org</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="txt">junit</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="txt">jupiter</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="txt">api</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="typ">Test</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="kw">import</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">org</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="txt">junit</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="txt">jupiter</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="txt">api</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="txt">extension</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="typ">BeforeEachCallback</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="kw">import</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">org</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="txt">junit</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="txt">jupiter</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="txt">api</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="txt">extension</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="typ">ExtendWith</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="kw">import</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">org</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="txt">junit</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="txt">jupiter</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="txt">api</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="txt">extension</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="typ">ExtensionContext</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="kw">import</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">org</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="txt">junit</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="txt">jupiter</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="txt">api</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="txt">extension</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="typ">ParameterContext</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="kw">import</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">org</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="txt">junit</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="txt">jupiter</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="txt">api</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="txt">extension</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="typ">ParameterResolver</span><span class="pun">;</span>

<span class="com">/**</span>
<span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">*</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">JUnit</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="num">5</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">Extension</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">API</span><span class="pun">:</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">one</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">composable</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">model</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">that</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">replaces</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">JUnit</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="num">4</span><span class="str">&#x27;s</span>
<span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">*</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span><span class="ann">@code</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="ann">@RunWith</span><span class="pun">}</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">Runner</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="txt">single</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">exclusive</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">and</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span><span class="ann">@code</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="ann">@Rule</span><span class="pun">}</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="txt">inheritance</span><span class="pun">-</span><span class="txt">based</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">.</span>
<span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">*</span><span class="pun">/</span>
<span class="kw">class</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">TimingExtension</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">implements</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">BeforeEachCallback</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">ParameterResolver</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>

<span class="txt">    </span><span class="kw">private</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">static</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">final</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">ExtensionContext</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="typ">Namespace</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">NS</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">=</span>
<span class="txt">        </span><span class="typ">ExtensionContext</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="typ">Namespace</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">create</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="typ">TimingExtension</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="kw">class</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>

<span class="txt">    </span><span class="ann">@Override</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="kw">public</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">void</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">beforeEach</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="typ">ExtensionContext</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">context</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>
<span class="txt">        </span><span class="txt">context</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">getStore</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="typ">NS</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">put</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">&quot;start&quot;</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">System</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">nanoTime</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="pun">}</span>

<span class="txt">    </span><span class="ann">@Override</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="kw">public</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">boolean</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">supportsParameter</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="typ">ParameterContext</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">pc</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">ExtensionContext</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">ec</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>
<span class="txt">        </span><span class="kw">return</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">pc</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">getParameter</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">getType</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">Stopwatch</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="kw">class</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="pun">}</span>

<span class="txt">    </span><span class="ann">@Override</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="kw">public</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">Object</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">resolveParameter</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="typ">ParameterContext</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">pc</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">ExtensionContext</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">ec</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>
<span class="txt">        </span><span class="kw">long</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">start</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">ec</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">getStore</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="typ">NS</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">get</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">&quot;start&quot;</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">long</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="kw">class</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="txt">        </span><span class="kw">return</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">new</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">Stopwatch</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="txt">start</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="pun">}</span>
<span class="pun">}</span></code></pre></div><span class="col-divider"></span><div class="col"><pre><code><span class="com">// No inheritance, no Runner: just declare the extensions you want.</span>
<span class="ann">@ExtendWith</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="typ">TimingExtension</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="kw">class</span><span class="pun">)</span>
<span class="kw">class</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">OrderServiceTest</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>

<span class="txt">    </span><span class="ann">@Test</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="kw">void</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">placesOrder</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="typ">Stopwatch</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">stopwatch</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span><span class="txt">   </span><span class="com">// injected by ParameterResolver</span>
<span class="txt">        </span><span class="com">// ... exercise the system under test ...</span>
<span class="txt">        </span><span class="typ">System</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="txt">out</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">println</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">&quot;elapsed = &quot;</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">+</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">stopwatch</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">elapsedMillis</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">+</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="str">&quot;ms&quot;</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="pun">}</span>
<span class="pun">}</span></code></pre></div></div></div>

Open pen preview · New pen on CodePen

💡 JUnit 5's Extension API replaces JUnit 4's `@RunWith` Runner and `@Rule`. ✅ One model: implement lifecycle hooks like `BeforeEachCallback` instead of an exclusive Runner ✅ `ParameterResolver` injects test dependencies — no base-class inheritance needed ✅ Extensions compose: stack several with `@ExtendWith` and they just work together #Java #JUnit5 #Testing

.drawio diagram · CodePen preview · Source .java

Code — CodePen pen

html, body {
  margin: 0;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  min-height: 100vh;
  box-sizing: border-box;
}
body {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: stretch;
  justify-content: stretch;
  padding: 0.5rem;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
}
.carbon {
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  width: 100%;
  min-height: calc(100vh - 1rem);
  max-width: none;
  border-radius: 10px;
  box-shadow: 0 12px 48px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
  overflow: hidden;
}
.carbon-titlebar {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
  height: 36px;
  padding: 0 16px;
  background: #252836;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.carbon-dot {
  width: 12px;
  height: 12px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.carbon-dot.red { background: #ff5f56; }
.carbon-dot.yellow { background: #ffbd2e; }
.carbon-dot.green { background: #27c93f; }
.carbon-module {
  margin-left: auto;
  font: 13px/1 system-ui, sans-serif;
  color: #8b949e;
  letter-spacing: 0.02em;
}
.carbon-editor {
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  min-height: 0;
  background: #011627;
  padding: 1.5rem 2rem 1.75rem;
  overflow: auto;
}
.carbon-editor pre {
  margin: 0;
  flex: 1;
  font-family: "Fira Code", "JetBrains Mono", Consolas, monospace;
  font-size: 18px;
  line-height: 30px;
  white-space: pre;
  tab-size: 4;
}
.carbon-editor .kw { color: #c792ea; }
.carbon-editor .ann { color: #ffb86c; }
.carbon-editor .str { color: #c3e88d; }
.carbon-editor .typ { color: #ffcb6b; }
.carbon-editor .met { color: #82aaff; }
.carbon-editor .com { color: #5c6370; }
.carbon-editor .num { color: #f78c6c; }
.carbon-editor .pun { color: #89ddff; }
.carbon-editor .txt { color: #d6deeb; }
.carbon-editor.cols {
  flex-direction: row;
  gap: 1.75rem;
  align-items: stretch;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col {
  flex: 1 1 0;
  min-width: 0;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col pre {
  flex: 1;
  font-size: 15px;
  line-height: 24px;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col-divider {
  align-self: stretch;
  position: relative;
  width: 1px;
  background: #1d3b53;
  flex: 0 0 auto;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col-divider::after {
  content: "\2192";
  position: absolute;
  top: 50%;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
  width: 30px;
  height: 30px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: #011627;
  border: 1px solid #1d3b53;
  color: #82aaff;
  font-size: 16px;
}

<div class="carbon"><div class="carbon-titlebar"><span class="carbon-dot red"></span><span class="carbon-dot yellow"></span><span class="carbon-dot green"></span><span class="carbon-module">java-tips</span></div><div class="carbon-editor"><pre><code><span class="com">// ❌ A new String object on every iteration</span>
<span class="typ">String</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">csv</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="str">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="kw">for</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="typ">String</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">item</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">:</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">items</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="txt">csv</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">+</span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">item</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">+</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="str">&quot;,&quot;</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="pun">}</span>

<span class="com">// ✅ One mutable buffer — no garbage</span>
<span class="typ">StringBuilder</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">sb</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">new</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">StringBuilder</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="kw">for</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="typ">String</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">item</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">:</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">items</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="txt">sb</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">append</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="txt">item</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">append</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">&#x27;,&#x27;</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="pun">}</span>
<span class="typ">String</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">csv</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">sb</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">toString</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span></code></pre></div></div>

Open pen preview · New pen on CodePen

Java tip💡: Use StringBuilder instead of String for concatenating strings in loops. ❌ String is immutable, making it inefficient in loops, especially large ones. ✅ StringBuilder is mutable and optimized for repeated string appends. #Java #CodeTips

.drawio diagram · CodePen preview · Source .java

  margin: 0;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  min-height: 100vh;
  box-sizing: border-box;
}
body {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: stretch;
  justify-content: stretch;
  padding: 0.5rem;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
}
.carbon {
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  width: 100%;
  min-height: calc(100vh - 1rem);
  max-width: none;
  border-radius: 10px;

}

  overflow: auto;

.carbon-editor pre {
  margin: 0;
  flex: 1;
  font-family: "Fira Code", "JetBrains Mono", Consolas, monospace;
  font-size: 18px;
  line-height: 30px;
  white-space: pre;
  tab-size: 4;
}
.carbon-editor .kw { color: #c792ea; }
.carbon-editor .ann { color: #ffb86c; }
.carbon-editor .str { color: #c3e88d; }
.carbon-editor .typ { color: #ffcb6b; }
.carbon-editor .met { color: #82aaff; }
.carbon-editor .com { color: #5c6370; }
.carbon-editor .num { color: #f78c6c; }
.carbon-editor .pun { color: #89ddff; }

.carbon-editor.cols {
  flex-direction: row;

  align-items: center;

<div class="carbon"><div class="carbon-titlebar"><span class="carbon-dot red"></span><span class="carbon-dot yellow"></span><span class="carbon-dot green"></span><span class="carbon-module">java-tips</span></div><div class="carbon-editor"><pre><code><span class="com">// ✅ Auto-closes the stream, even if an exception is thrown</span>
<span class="kw">try</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="typ">BufferedReader</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">reader</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">=</span>
<span class="txt">         </span><span class="kw">new</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">BufferedReader</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="kw">new</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">FileReader</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">&quot;data.txt&quot;</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="typ">String</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">line</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="kw">while</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="txt">line</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">reader</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">readLine</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">!</span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">null</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>
<span class="txt">        </span><span class="typ">System</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="txt">out</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">println</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="txt">line</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="pun">}</span>
<span class="pun">}</span>
<span class="com">// No finally block, no leaked file handles</span></code></pre></div></div>

Open pen preview · New pen on CodePen

Java tip💡: always close resources like BufferedReader, InputStream, OutputStream, using try-with-resources to avoid memory leaks. #Java #BestPractices

.drawio diagram · CodePen preview · Source .java

  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  min-height: 100vh;
  box-sizing: border-box;
}
body {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: stretch;
  justify-content: stretch;
  padding: 0.5rem;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
}
.carbon {
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  width: 100%;
  min-height: calc(100vh - 1rem);
  max-width: none;
  border-radius: 10px;
  box-shadow: 0 12px 48px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
  overflow: hidden;
}
.carbon-titlebar {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
  height: 36px;
  padding: 0 16px;
  background: #252836;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.carbon-dot {
  width: 12px;
  height: 12px;

  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.carbon-dot.red { background: #ff5f56; }
.carbon-dot.yellow { background: #ffbd2e; }

.carbon-module {
  margin-left: auto;
  font: 13px/1 system-ui, sans-serif;
  color: #8b949e;
  letter-spacing: 0.02em;
}
.carbon-editor {
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  min-height: 0;
  background: #011627;
  padding: 1.5rem 2rem 1.75rem;
  overflow: auto;
}
.carbon-editor pre {
  margin: 0;
  flex: 1;
  font-family: "Fira Code", "JetBrains Mono", Consolas, monospace;
  font-size: 18px;
  line-height: 30px;
  white-space: pre;
  tab-size: 4;
}
.carbon-editor .kw { color: #c792ea; }
.carbon-editor .ann { color: #ffb86c; }
.carbon-editor .str { color: #c3e88d; }
.carbon-editor .typ { color: #ffcb6b; }
.carbon-editor .met { color: #82aaff; }
.carbon-editor .com { color: #5c6370; }
.carbon-editor .num { color: #f78c6c; }
.carbon-editor .pun { color: #89ddff; }
.carbon-editor .txt { color: #d6deeb; }
.carbon-editor.cols {
  flex-direction: row;
  gap: 1.75rem;
  align-items: stretch;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col {
  flex: 1 1 0;
  min-width: 0;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col pre {
  flex: 1;
  font-size: 15px;
  line-height: 24px;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col-divider {
  align-self: stretch;
  position: relative;
  width: 1px;
  background: #1d3b53;
  flex: 0 0 auto;

.carbon-editor.cols .col-divider::after {
  content: "\2192";
  position: absolute;
  top: 50%;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
  width: 30px;
  height: 30px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: #011627;
  border: 1px solid #1d3b53;
  color: #82aaff;
  font-size: 16px;
}

<div class="carbon"><div class="carbon-titlebar"><span class="carbon-dot red"></span><span class="carbon-dot yellow"></span><span class="carbon-dot green"></span><span class="carbon-module">java-tips</span></div><div class="carbon-editor"><pre><code><span class="kw">public</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">class</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">Worker</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="com">// Without volatile a thread may read a stale, cached value</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="kw">private</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">volatile</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">boolean</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">running</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">true</span><span class="pun">;</span>

<span class="txt">    </span><span class="kw">public</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">void</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">stop</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">running</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">false</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">}</span>

<span class="txt">    </span><span class="kw">public</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">void</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">run</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>
<span class="txt">        </span><span class="kw">while</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="txt">running</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>
<span class="txt">            </span><span class="com">// sees stop() called from another thread</span>
<span class="txt">        </span><span class="pun">}</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="pun">}</span>
<span class="pun">}</span></code></pre></div></div>

Open pen preview · New pen on CodePen

Java Tip #4 💡: Threads may cache variables values. Mark the variable with the 'volatile' keyword to ensure that any change is seen by other threads. This is the most basic synchronization mechanism of Java. #Java #JavaTips #Multithreading

.drawio diagram · CodePen preview · Source .java

  margin: 0;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  min-height: 100vh;
  box-sizing: border-box;

  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;

  width: 1px;
  background: #1d3b53;
  flex: 0 0 auto;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col-divider::after {
  content: "\2192";
  position: absolute;
  top: 50%;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
  width: 30px;
  height: 30px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: #011627;
  border: 1px solid #1d3b53;
  color: #82aaff;
  font-size: 16px;
}

<div class="carbon"><div class="carbon-titlebar"><span class="carbon-dot red"></span><span class="carbon-dot yellow"></span><span class="carbon-dot green"></span><span class="carbon-module">java-tips</span></div><div class="carbon-editor"><pre><code><span class="typ">List</span><span class="pun">&lt;</span><span class="typ">String</span><span class="pun">&gt;</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">names</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">users</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">stream</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">filter</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="typ">User</span><span class="pun">:</span><span class="pun">:</span><span class="txt">isActive</span><span class="pun">)</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">map</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="typ">User</span><span class="pun">:</span><span class="pun">:</span><span class="txt">getName</span><span class="pun">)</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">sorted</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="met">toList</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="com">// Declarative: say WHAT you want, not HOW to loop</span></code></pre></div></div>

Open pen preview · New pen on CodePen

💡Java tip: Use the Stream API for declarative collection processing. ✅ Express what you want, not how to do it, and avoid writing verbose loops #Java #Collections

.drawio diagram · CodePen preview · Source .java

Tweet #63

Code — CodePen pen

html, body {
  margin: 0;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  min-height: 100vh;
  box-sizing: border-box;
}
body {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: stretch;
  justify-content: stretch;
  padding: 0.5rem;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
}
.carbon {
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  width: 100%;
  min-height: calc(100vh - 1rem);
  max-width: none;
  border-radius: 10px;
  box-shadow: 0 12px 48px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
  overflow: hidden;
}
.carbon-titlebar {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
  height: 36px;
  padding: 0 16px;
  background: #252836;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.carbon-dot {
  width: 12px;
  height: 12px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.carbon-dot.red { background: #ff5f56; }
.carbon-dot.yellow { background: #ffbd2e; }
.carbon-dot.green { background: #27c93f; }
.carbon-module {
  margin-left: auto;
  font: 13px/1 system-ui, sans-serif;
  color: #8b949e;
  letter-spacing: 0.02em;
}
.carbon-editor {
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  min-height: 0;
  background: #011627;
  padding: 1.5rem 2rem 1.75rem;
  overflow: auto;
}
.carbon-editor pre {
  margin: 0;
  flex: 1;
  font-family: "Fira Code", "JetBrains Mono", Consolas, monospace;
  font-size: 18px;
  line-height: 30px;
  white-space: pre;
  tab-size: 4;
}
.carbon-editor .kw { color: #c792ea; }
.carbon-editor .ann { color: #ffb86c; }
.carbon-editor .str { color: #c3e88d; }
.carbon-editor .typ { color: #ffcb6b; }
.carbon-editor .met { color: #82aaff; }
.carbon-editor .com { color: #5c6370; }
.carbon-editor .num { color: #f78c6c; }
.carbon-editor .pun { color: #89ddff; }
.carbon-editor .txt { color: #d6deeb; }
.carbon-editor.cols {
  flex-direction: row;
  gap: 1.75rem;
  align-items: stretch;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col {
  flex: 1 1 0;
  min-width: 0;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col pre {
  flex: 1;
  font-size: 15px;
  line-height: 24px;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col-divider {
  align-self: stretch;
  position: relative;
  width: 1px;
  background: #1d3b53;
  flex: 0 0 auto;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col-divider::after {
  content: "\2192";
  position: absolute;
  top: 50%;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
  width: 30px;
  height: 30px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: #011627;
  border: 1px solid #1d3b53;
  color: #82aaff;
  font-size: 16px;
}

<div class="carbon"><div class="carbon-titlebar"><span class="carbon-dot red"></span><span class="carbon-dot yellow"></span><span class="carbon-dot green"></span><span class="carbon-module">java-tips</span></div><div class="carbon-editor"><pre><code><span class="com">// ❌ Too many parameters — easy to pass them in the wrong order</span>
<span class="kw">public</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">void</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">createUser</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="typ">String</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">firstName</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">String</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">lastName</span><span class="pun">,</span>
<span class="txt">                       </span><span class="typ">String</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">street</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">String</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">city</span><span class="pun">,</span>
<span class="txt">                       </span><span class="typ">String</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">zip</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">String</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">country</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="com">// ...</span>
<span class="pun">}</span>

<span class="met">createUser</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">&quot;Mario&quot;</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="str">&quot;Rossi&quot;</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="str">&quot;Via Roma&quot;</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="str">&quot;Rome&quot;</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="str">&quot;00100&quot;</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="str">&quot;IT&quot;</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>


<span class="com">// ✅ Group related values into a cohesive object</span>
<span class="kw">public</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">record</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">Address</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="typ">String</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">street</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">String</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">city</span><span class="pun">,</span>
<span class="txt">                      </span><span class="typ">String</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">zip</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">String</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">country</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span><span class="pun">}</span>

<span class="kw">public</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">void</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">createUser</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="typ">String</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">firstName</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">String</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">lastName</span><span class="pun">,</span>
<span class="txt">                       </span><span class="typ">Address</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">address</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="com">// ...</span>
<span class="pun">}</span>

<span class="met">createUser</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">&quot;Mario&quot;</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="str">&quot;Rossi&quot;</span><span class="pun">,</span>
<span class="txt">    </span><span class="kw">new</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">Address</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">&quot;Via Roma&quot;</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="str">&quot;Rome&quot;</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="str">&quot;00100&quot;</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="str">&quot;IT&quot;</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span></code></pre></div></div>

Open pen preview · New pen on CodePen

Java Tip #9💡: Avoid excessive number of method parameters. Group related values into objects. #Java #Refactoring

.drawio diagram · CodePen preview · Source .java

body {

.carbon {

  min-height: calc(100vh - 1rem);

<div class="carbon"><div class="carbon-titlebar"><span class="carbon-dot red"></span><span class="carbon-dot yellow"></span><span class="carbon-dot green"></span><span class="carbon-module">java-tips</span></div><div class="carbon-editor"><pre><code><span class="com">// ❌ Vague names — you must read the body to know what they do</span>
<span class="kw">public</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">List</span><span class="pun">&lt;</span><span class="typ">User</span><span class="pun">&gt;</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">get</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="kw">boolean</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">b</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">}</span>
<span class="kw">public</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">void</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">process</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="typ">Order</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">o</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">}</span>
<span class="kw">public</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">BigDecimal</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">calc</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="typ">Cart</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">c</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">}</span>

<span class="com">// ✅ Names that reveal intent — the call site reads like a sentence</span>
<span class="kw">public</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">List</span><span class="pun">&lt;</span><span class="typ">User</span><span class="pun">&gt;</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">findActiveUsers</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">}</span>
<span class="kw">public</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="kw">void</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">cancelOrder</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="typ">Order</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">order</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">}</span>
<span class="kw">public</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="typ">BigDecimal</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">calculateCartTotal</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="typ">Cart</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">cart</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">{</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">}</span>

<span class="typ">List</span><span class="pun">&lt;</span><span class="typ">User</span><span class="pun">&gt;</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">active</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">findActiveUsers</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span>
<span class="typ">BigDecimal</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="txt">total</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="txt"> </span><span class="met">calculateCartTotal</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="txt">cart</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pun">;</span></code></pre></div></div>

Open pen preview · New pen on CodePen

Java Tip💡: Use meaningful method names that reflect their purpose. #Java #CleanCode

.drawio diagram · CodePen preview · Source .java

html, body {
  margin: 0;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  min-height: 100vh;
  box-sizing: border-box;
}
body {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: stretch;
  justify-content: stretch;
  padding: 0.5rem;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
}
.carbon {
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  width: 100%;
  min-height: calc(100vh - 1rem);
  max-width: none;
  border-radius: 10px;
  box-shadow: 0 12px 48px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
  overflow: hidden;
}
.carbon-titlebar {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
  height: 36px;
  padding: 0 16px;
  background: #252836;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.carbon-dot {
  width: 12px;
  height: 12px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.carbon-dot.red { background: #ff5f56; }

.carbon-module {
  margin-left: auto;
  font: 13px/1 system-ui, sans-serif;

}

  overflow: auto;
}
.carbon-editor pre {
  margin: 0;
  flex: 1;

  font-size: 18px;
  line-height: 30px;
  white-space: pre;
  tab-size: 4;
}
.carbon-editor .kw { color: #c792ea; }
.carbon-editor .ann { color: #ffb86c; }
.carbon-editor .str { color: #c3e88d; }
.carbon-editor .typ { color: #ffcb6b; }
.carbon-editor .met { color: #82aaff; }
.carbon-editor .com { color: #5c6370; }
.carbon-editor .num { color: #f78c6c; }
.carbon-editor .pun { color: #89ddff; }
.carbon-editor .txt { color: #d6deeb; }
.carbon-editor.cols {
  flex-direction: row;

  align-items: stretch;
}
.carbon-editor.cols .col {
  flex: 1 1 0;

}
.carbon-editor.cols .col-divider::after {

  position: absolute;
  top: 50%;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
  width: 30px;

  display: flex;
